1000647064.english: ... Tch, let's run away for now.

1000647065.english: This is Hero. JangHwa is entering the target area ahead!
1000647065.korean: 여기는 히어로. 전방에 장화가 목표 지점으로 진입하고 있어요!

1000647066.english: Mother receiving. What's the situation with the surrounding Metal Parasite Ones?
1000647066.korean: 마더 수신. 주변 철충 상황은 어떤가요?

1000647067.english: Ugh, it's not very good. Because of the commotion just now, all the nearby Metal Parasite Beasts have started moving.
1000647067.korean: 윽, 별로 안 좋아요. 좀 전의 소란 때문에 근방 철충들이 전부 움직이기 시작했어요.

1000647068.english: Okay. Please keep me updated on the surrounding situation.

1000647070.english: You're pretty good. You've backed me into a corner.
1000647070.korean: 좀 하는데. 막다른 곳으로 몰아 넣다니.

1000647071.english: ... Could you please listen to my story for a moment?

1000647073.english: Ah... You want to buy some time, don't you?

1000647074.english: That's not right. JangHwa, you and-

1000647075.english: I don't want to hear it, so just shut up and die...!

1000647078.english: JangHwa, you've used up all the bombs with this, haven't you?
1000647078.korean: 장화, 지금 이걸로 폭탄은 전부 사용했겠죠.

1000647079.english: It doesn't matter. Wire is enough for you guys.

1000647080.english: ... I can't imagine how much you've suffered until now.
1000647080.korean: ...당신이 그동안 얼마나 고통받았을지, 저로서는 알 수 없어요.

1000647081.english: Okay, now we're finally getting somewhere.

1000647082.english: That doesn't mean... We can't just leave it like this.
1000647082.korean: 그렇다고 해서... 이대로 내버려 둘 수는 없어요.

1000647083.english: Please. Come with us. I am your family.
1000647083.korean: 부탁이에요. 저희와 함께 가요. 제가 당신의 가족이-

1000647086.english: I was wondering what you were going to say, and it was that all along?
1000647086.korean: 무슨 말을 하나 했더니 결국 그거야?

1000647088.english: You always have something by your side, so can you understand me, who has nothing?
1000647088.korean: 항상 네 곁에는 무언가가 있는데, 아무것도 없는 나를 이해할 수 있겠냐고!

1000647091.english: Okay, come at me all at once!

1000647093.english: Mom! The Metal Parasites will arrive on the scene soon!

1000647097.english: While Draco and Bulgasari block JangHwa, we'll take care of the Metal Parasite.
1000647097.korean: 드라코와 불가사리가 장화를 막는동안 저희가 철충을 처리합니다.

1000647098.english: You can't go past this point!

1000647099.english: Get out of the way, you idiot!

1000647100.english: I'll tear it up right now- Ugh!

1000647105.english: Oh, man... This is really annoying...

1000647106.english: Everyone, be careful! Some Metal Parasite Beasts have broken through and are heading that way-
1000647106.korean: 여러분, 조심하세요! 일부 철충이 돌파해서 그쪽으로-

1000647107.english: Oh, a Bulgasari! Draco! Be careful!

1000647111.english: Cough, cough... The explosion has obscured my vision...!

1000647112.english: ... The signal from JangHwa has disappeared. It seems they used a signal jammer while their vision was obscured.
1000647112.korean: ...장화의 신호가 사라졌어요. 시야가 가려진 틈을 타서 신호 은폐기를 사용한 모양입니다.

1000647114.english: ...We'll pause the tracking for a moment.

1000647115.english: Let's retreat to a safe area away from the Iron Beasts and plan our next move.
1000647115.korean: 철충들을 피해 안전한 지역으로 물러나서 다음 계획을 세워보죠.

1000647118.english: It was a chaotic situation with even the Metal Parasite joining in. It's a huge relief that you weren't hurt.
1000647118.korean: 철충까지 끼어든 혼잡한 상황이었으니까요. 다치지 않은게 천만다행이에요.

1000647119.english: What do we do now? If they're determined to conceal their signal and hide, there's no way to find them.
1000647119.korean: 이제 어떻게 하죠? 작정하고 신호를 은폐하고 숨어버리면 찾을 방법이 없어요.

1000647121.english: Well, if you lock down the city and search every single building thoroughly, you'll eventually find it...
1000647121.korean: 그야 도시를 봉쇄하고 건물 하나하나 샅샅이 뒤지면 나오기야 하겠는데...

1000647124.english: You wait from a distance, and I'll be the bait.
1000647124.korean: 여러분은 멀리서 대기하고, 제가 미끼가 되는 거예요.

1000647125.english: No, you can't. It's too dangerous!

1000647127.english: Meeting face-to-face with just the two of us is too risky.
1000647127.korean: 단 둘이 대면하는 건 너무 위험 부담이 커요.

1000647128.english: I'll never let Mom go alone! She's also incredibly strong, so...
1000647128.korean: 엄마 혼자는 절대 못 보내요! 걔, 힘도 엄청 세니까...

1000647130.english: This time too, JangHwa attacked regardless of whether we were there or not.
1000647130.korean: 이번에도 장화는 저희가 있건말건 습격해 왔잖아요.

1000647133.english: That's how much we worry about Mom too.

1000647135.english: Anyway, I can't let Mom go alone.

1000647136.english: And... It doesn't work even between us.

1000647139.english: Okay. That "let me know anytime you need help" thing, I'm going to hold them to it.
1000647139.korean: 응응. 도움이 필요하면 언제든지 얘기하라는 말, 책임지게 만들어야지.

1000647141.english: Okay. Just as you all said...

1000647142.english: I'll have you ask the commander for help.

1000647144.english: Oh, damn... I'm dying from the pain...

1000647146.english: I have no idea what they're thinking.
1000647146.korean: 도대체 무슨 생각인지 알 수가 없어.

1000647147.english: You understand me, you'll be my family...

1000647148.english: ... Ha. That's impossible. It's all just lip service.
1000647148.korean: ...하. 그럴 리가 있나. 전부 입바른 말일 뿐이지.

1000647150.english: ... You don't need to think about it. Just like always, you'll just get rid of everything.
1000647150.korean: ...생각할 필요 없어. 평소처럼 그냥, 전부 없애버리는 거야.

1000647151.english: Okay... All of it, every single bit...

1000647152.english: - While commanding the unit, I received a call from the Mongoose team.
1000647152.korean: - 부대를 지휘하던 중, 몽구스 팀에게 연락을 받았다.

1000647153.english: - In response to the request for assistance in communicating with JangHwa, we have organized forces that can provide support in the operational area at any time.
1000647153.korean: - 장화와 대화하기 위해 도와달라는 요청에 작전 지역 근방에 언제든지 지원할 수 있는 병력을 편성했다.

1000647154.english: - Just as I was memorizing the tactical map of the operation area and the troop deployment situation, I received a communication from HongRyeon.
1000647154.korean: - 한창 작전 지역의 전술 지도와 병력 배치 상황을 머리 속에 집어 넣는 중에 홍련에게 통신이 들어왔다.

1000647155.english: Commander, we have arrived at the target location.

1000647156.english: Other than a few Metal Parasite nearby, there's no problem.
1000647156.korean: 주변에 철충이 조금 있는 것 말고는 문제없어요.

1000647157.english: - It seems some of the Metal Parasite have escaped.

1000647158.english: This much is enough for us.

1000647159.english: I will now prepare for the operation. I'll let you know if I find JangHwa.
1000647159.korean: 이만 작전을 준비하도록 하겠습니다. 장화를 발견하면 연락드릴게요.

1000647161.english: - I disconnect and fall into thought.

1000647162.english: - A lot has happened since my first meeting with JangHwa.
1000647162.korean: - 장화와의 첫 만남부터 지금까지 많은 일이 있었다.

1000647163.english: - The mongoose team had the toughest time, but they still persevered.
1000647163.korean: - 가장 힘들었을 몽구스 팀이지만, 그래도 꿋꿋하게 버텨주었다.

1000647164.english: - So now, it's time to reap the rewards.

1000647166.english: Let's wait here until JangHwa arrive.

1000647167.english: Everyone, please be vigilant and keep a close watch on your surroundings.

1000647168.english: Mother, I'll report the reconnaissance results.

1000647169.english: There are two groups of Metal Parasite Beasts a certain distance from here...
1000647169.korean: 이곳에서 어느 정도 떨어진 지점에 두 개의 철충 집단이 있는데...

1000647170.english: They are approximately 45 degrees and 300 degrees in azimuth, respectively.

1000647171.english: Keep observing, and report any unusual movements immediately.
1000647171.korean: 계속 관찰하고, 이상한 움직임이 보이면 즉각 보고해주고요.

1000647175.english: Based on their previous actions, they'll definitely come.
1000647175.korean: 이전 행보를 보면 분명 올 거야.

1000647176.english: We don't have much time left.

1000647177.english: We must find JangHwa by any means necessary.
1000647177.korean: 무슨 수를 써서라도 장화를 찾아내야 합니다.

1000647178.english: For that, this method is the most effective.
1000647178.korean: 그러기 위해서는 이 방법이 제일 효과적이에요.

1000647179.english: The good thing is, we can handle it just with ourselves.
1000647179.korean: 그나마 다행인 건, 우리만으로도 대응할 수 있어.

1000647180.english: Last time I missed it because of the Metal Parasite, but this time the support troops can be deployed right away.
1000647180.korean: 저번에는 철충때문에 놓쳤지만, 이번에는 지원 병력이 곧바로 투입될 수 있으니까.

1000647181.english: If there are no interruptions, it should be possible.

1000647182.english: Here is Hero, personnel on the communication network, please respond.
1000647182.korean: 여기는 히어로, 통신망의 인원은 응답 바람.

1000647184.english: Operations Officer, the behavior of the Metal Parasite is strange.

1000647185.english: As if being attacked by something-

1000647187.english: JangHwa, JangHwa is engaged with the Metal Parasites - Ah!
1000647187.korean: 장화, 장화가 철충과 교전 중- 앗!

1000647188.english: She's attacking the Metal Parasites and coming this way.

1000647189.english: JangHwa? Miho, can you fire all the way to the combat zone?
1000647189.korean: 장화요? 미호, 교전 지역까지 사격할 수 있나요?

1000647190.english: There's nothing to bother me, so that's enough.

1000647192.english: The situation is urgent, so I'll skip the questions.

1000647193.english: Operations Officer, there's something a bit off about JangHwa.

1000647195.english: You could say they look a little uneasy, or that they're attacking haphazardly.
1000647195.korean: 조금 불안해 보인다고 해야 할지, 마구잡이로 공격하는 듯한 모습을 보여요.

1000647196.english: I'll change the plan. We're moving to JangHwa.

1000647197.english: If she's in danger, please provide support immediately. Mother out.
1000647197.korean: 두 사람은 그녀가 위험하다면 바로 지원해주세요. 마더 아웃.

1000647199.english: Well, if we knew that, we'd be happy to help...
1000647199.korean: 글쎄, 그걸 알 수 있다면 우리가 도와줄 텐데…

1000647200.english: There's no way until they speak themselves.

1000647201.english: Operations Officer, we're ready to move.

1000647202.english: Transmitting to the Mongoose team. We need to tie JangHwa' feet until our allies arrive.
1000647202.korean: 몽구스 팀에게 전파합니다. 아군이 올 때까지 장화의 발을 묶어야 해요.

1000647203.english: Be careful, there are a lot of Metal Parasites

1000647205.english: - While waiting nearby, a loud explosion was heard.
1000647205.korean: - 인근에서 대기하던 중, 큰 폭음이 들려왔다.

1000647207.english: JangHwa began attacking the Metal Parasites.

1000647208.english: It seems we encountered it on the way here.
1000647208.korean: 이쪽으로 오는 중에 마주친 것으로 보입니다.

1000647209.english: First, I asked Pinto to provide JangHwa in case of an emergency.
1000647209.korean: 우선 만약의 경우를 대비해 핀토에게 장화를 지원해달라고 했습니다.

1000647210.english: We will go to JangHwa first.

1000647211.english: - After finishing communications, I called in the reconnaissance team to assess the situation.
1000647211.korean: - 통신을 마친 나는, 정찰 인원을 불러 상황을 파악했다.

1000647212.english: - It seems the surrounding Metal Parasite Ones are swarming in because JangHwa indiscriminately detonated bombs.
1000647212.korean: - 장화가 무차별로 폭탄을 터뜨린 탓에 주변의 철충들이 몰려오는 듯하다.

1000647213.english: - I rushed off to support them.
1000647213.korean: - 나는 그들을 지원하기 위해 서둘러 출발했다.

1000647215.english: Ahaha! Die, all of you die!

1000647216.english: Okay, just don't think about anything and get rid of everything, all of it.
1000647216.korean: 그래, 아무 생각도 하지 말고 다 전부 다 없애버리면 되는 거야.

1000647217.english: Wait, HongRyeon, I'm on my way there now.
1000647217.korean: 기다려 홍련, 지금 그쪽으로 가고 있으니까.

1000647220.english: Take it easy, you're only going to get hurt.

1000647221.english: What do you care if I get hurt or not?

1000647222.english: If you get hurt, your mom will worry!

1000647224.english: ... Why are you doing this to me?

1000647225.english: I don't need your pathetic pity!

1000647227.english: I'm providing covering fire, but there are too many enemies.
1000647227.korean: 지원 사격은 하고 있는데, 적이 너무 많아.

1000647228.english: The operations officer will be here soon, just a little longer-

1000647230.english: Miho, let's go back and regroup for now.

1000647233.english: JangHwa is right here, but she's surrounded by a horde of Metal Parasite.
1000647233.korean: 장화는 이 앞에 있습니다만, 철충 무리에 둘러싸였어요.

1000647234.english: I was going to offer support, but the constant onslaught forced me to retreat...
1000647234.korean: 지원하려고 했지만, 계속해서 몰려드는 바람에 후퇴할 수 밖에...

1000647235.english: We need to help until the main force arrives. Everyone, prepare for battle!
1000647235.korean: 본대가 올 때까지 도와야 해요. 모두 전투 준비를-

1000647236.english: Those who only interfere at every turn are persistent...

1000647238.english: JangHwa, just wait a little longer. I'll save you right now-
1000647238.korean: 장화, 조금만 기다려요. 지금 구해줄 테니-

1000647239.english: You're saving me? Stop talking nonsense and die by my hand.
1000647239.korean: 날 구한다고? 헛소리 말고 내 손에 죽어.

1000647240.english: Because you make me dizzy and anxious, I'll kill you to relieve this anxiety.
1000647240.korean: 너 때문에 어지럽고 불안하니까, 널 죽여서 이 불안함을 풀겠어.

1000647241.english: JangHwa, please stop now. Then only you will suffer.
1000647241.korean: 장화, 이제 그만 하세요. 그러다가 당신만 힘들어져요.

1000647242.english: It doesn't matter. After everything disappeared, killing you was the only reason I had left to live.
1000647242.korean: 상관없어. 모든 것이 사라진 이후, 너를 죽이는 것만이 내 삶의 이유였어.

1000647243.english: But if I can't even do that now, then why am I even alive?
1000647243.korean: 그런데 지금 와서 그것조차 하지 못하면, 나는 왜 살아있는 거지?

1000647245.english: Tell me! How am I supposed to live?!
1000647245.korean: 말해! 나는 어떻게 살아야 하는 건데!

1000647246.english: - When I arrived leading the main force, I saw JangHwa and HongRyeon surrounded by Ironworm.
1000647246.korean: - 본대를 이끌고 도착하니 철충에 둘러싸인 장화와 홍련의 모습이 보였다.

1000647247.english: Commander, there are still Metal Parasite Beasts nearby...

1000647248.english: Don't do anything unnecessary, I don't need any help...
1000647248.korean: 쓸데없는 짓 하지 마, 도움 따윈 필요 없어...

1000647249.english: Because of you, I'm going crazy.
1000647249.korean: 네 녀석 때문에, 나는 미칠 것 같다고.

1000647250.english: These feelings I'm experiencing for the first time, the emotions I'm feeling for the first time, are driving me crazy!
1000647250.korean: 처음 겪는, 처음 느끼는 감정이 나를 미치게 만든단 말이야!

1000647251.english: - HongRyeon slowly walked toward the trembling JangHwa.
1000647251.korean: - 몸을 떨고 있는 장화를 향해 홍련이 천천히 걸어갔다.

1000647252.english: It might feel awkward and scary right now.

1000647253.english: Because there was no one to tell you what that feeling was.
1000647253.korean: 그 감정이 뭔지 당신에게 알려줄 사람이 없었으니까요.

1000647254.english: - HongRyeon smiled at JangHwa and spread her arms wide.
1000647254.korean: - 홍련은 장화를 향해 미소 지으며, 양팔을 벌렸다.

1000647257.english: - JangHwa lowered her head and slowly looked at HongRyeon.
1000647257.korean: - 장화는 고개를 떨구고 천천히 홍련을 바라보았다.

1000647258.english: - Behind her, the Ironworm was emitting a red glow.
1000647258.korean: - 그녀의 뒤에서 철충이 붉은빛을 내고 있었다.

1000647260.english: - HongRyeon threw herself into JangHwa's arms, and the two of them disappeared into the explosion.
1000647260.korean: - 홍련은 장화에게 몸을 내던졌고, 두 사람의 모습은 폭연 속으로 사라졌다.

1000647261.english: - The thick smoke is obscuring the two people's figures.
1000647261.korean: - 자욱하게 깔린 연기 때문에 두 사람의 모습이 보이지 않는다.

1000647262.english: - I shouted toward the explosion that had swallowed the two people.
1000647262.korean: - 나는 두 사람을 삼킨 폭연을 향해 소리쳤다.

1000647264.english: - Slowly, from within the dissipating smoke, Draco appeared with her shield raised.
1000647264.korean: - 서서히 걷히는 연기 속에서 방패를 세운 드라코가 나타났다.

1000647265.english: Draco, thank you for protecting me.

1000647266.english: I'm your enemy, so why are you protecting me? I was trying to kill you guys just now!
1000647266.korean: 난 너희 적이잖아, 왜 나를 지켜주는 거야? 방금까지도 너희를 죽이려고 했다고!

1000647267.english: But why, why are you doing this to me?
1000647267.korean: 그런데 왜, 나한테 왜 이러는 건데?

1000647268.english: I'm just protecting it because I want to.

1000647269.english: Do you know how I feel?

1000647270.english: When no matter how hard you try, you can't achieve what you want, the feeling of being protected by the person you hated...
1000647270.korean: 아무리 노력해도 원하는 것을 이루지 못할 때, 증오하던 대상에게서 보호받았을 때의 기분을...

1000647271.english: Do you know what it feels like for everything I've done until now to disappear in an instant?
1000647271.korean: 내가 여태까지 했던 모든 것이 한순간에 사라져 버리는 느낌을 아냐고!

1000647272.english: Ugh, the Metal Parasite are still swarming in.

1000647273.english: Operations Officer, I can't hold out any longer.

1000647275.english: - JangHwa takes out the detonator and walks toward the Metal Parasite alone.
1000647275.korean: - 장화는 기폭 장치를 꺼내고, 홀로 철충을 향해 걸어간다.

1000647277.english: That's impossible! If we stay like this, we'll just die!
1000647277.korean: 말도 안 돼요! 이대로는 죽을 뿐이라고요!

1000647278.english: Don't you understand what I'm saying?

1000647279.english: Because of you, I've lost all meaning in life.
1000647279.korean: 네 녀석 때문에 나는 모든 삶의 의미를 잃었어.

1000647280.english: Then what am I supposed to live for?
1000647280.korean: 그렇다면 나는 대체 무얼 위해서 살아야 하는 건데?

1000647281.english: I don't want to worry about anything anymore, I just want to rest right now...
1000647281.korean: 더는 아무것도 신경 쓰기 싫어, 지금은 쉬고 싶다고...

1000647282.english: - JangHwa, with her head bowed, said weakly.
1000647282.korean: - 장화는 고개를 떨군 채, 힘없이 말했다.

1000647285.english: If you come any closer, I'll blow you up.

1000647286.english: So leave me alone and get out of here.
1000647286.korean: 그러니 나는 내버려 두고, 여기서 떠나.

1000647287.english: - JangHwa fights alone against the swarming Metal Parasite.
1000647287.korean: - 장화는 몰려드는 철충에 홀로 맞서 싸운다.

1000647288.english: - Under the onslaught of attacks from all sides, JangHwa's body was becoming a wreck.
1000647288.korean: - 사방에서 쏟아지는 공격에 장화의 몸은 만신창이가 되어갔다.

1000647289.english: - The figure looked so precarious that it seemed as tho it would collapse at any moment.
1000647289.korean: - 그 모습은 너무나도 위태로워서 금방이라도 쓰러질 듯했다.

1000647290.english: Yes, Commander! The Mongoose team is transitioning to Rescue Plan S as of this time.
1000647290.korean: 네, 사령관님! 몽구스 팀은 현 시간부로 구출 플랜 S로 이행합니다.

1000647291.english: I'll clear the way, please provide cover.

1000647292.english: - The Bulgasari begins to break through the Metal Parasite.

1000647295.english: Mom! Get your JangHwa on quickly!

1000647297.english: - through the gap created by the two people, HongRyeon ran toward JangHwa.
1000647297.korean: - 두 사람이 만든 틈으로 홍련이 장화를 향해 뛰어갔다.

1000647300.english: You... What the hell is this? I told you not to come.
1000647300.korean: 너... 대체 뭐야, 오지 말라고 했잖아.

1000647301.english: I've come to pick you up.

1000647302.english: To pick me up? Are they even saying they want to die together?
1000647302.korean: 나를 데리러? 같이 죽고 싶다는 말이라도 하는 건가?

1000647303.english: Get out of here right now! Just seeing your face makes me want to go crazy!
1000647303.korean: 당장 꺼져! 나는 네 얼굴만 봐도 미쳐버릴 것 같단 말이야!

1000647304.english: I'll accept all your anxiety and pain.
1000647304.korean: 당신의 불안함도, 그 고통도 전부 받아줄게요.

1000647306.english: I don't want to live anymore. My life is over now...
1000647306.korean: 더는 살고 싶지 않아. 내 삶은 이제 끝났어...

1000647307.english: Are you really going to give up on everything like this?

1000647308.english: Is dying without being able to do anything what you wanted?
1000647308.korean: 아무것도 하지 못하고 죽는 게, 당신이 원하던 것이냐고요?

1000647309.english: What do you want to do? What was it that you truly wanted?
1000647309.korean: 당신은 어떻게 하고 싶은데요? 진심으로 원하던 건 무엇인데요!

1000647312.english: To experience things I've never felt before while I'm alive...

1000647313.english: I want to feel loved and like I'm with someone.
1000647313.korean: 누군가에게 사랑받고 함께한다는 기분을 느끼고 싶어.

1000647314.english: I was waiting for you to say that.

1000647315.english: It's not too late, so join us now.

1000647316.english: After living my life causing harm to many people, do I even deserve to live like this...?
1000647316.korean: 많은 사람에게 피해를 주며 살아온 내가, 그럴 자격이나 있을까...?

1000647317.english: Am I even worthy of being loved?
1000647317.korean: 나 같은 것도 사랑받을 자격이 있는 거야?

1000647318.english: There's no need for qualifications when it comes to giving and receiving love.
1000647318.korean: 사랑을 주고받는 데에, 자격 같은 건 필요 없어요.

1000647319.english: Everyone born into this world deserves to be loved. That goes for you too...
1000647319.korean: 이 세상에 태어난 누구도 사랑받아야 마땅해요. 그건 당신도 마찬가지니까...

1000647320.english: - HongRyeon reaches out her hand to JangHwa.

1000647321.english: Me, am I allowed to do this?

1000647323.english: So, survive. You have to live to be loved or to atone.
1000647323.korean: 그러니 살아남으세요. 살아야지 사랑을 받든, 속죄하든 할 수 있는 거예요.

1000647326.english: - JangHwa pushed HongRyeon away and collapsed.

1000647328.english: - The Mongoose team is desperately trying to hold back the Metal Parasite, but they are struggling due to being outnumbered.
1000647328.korean: - 몽구스 팀은 필사적으로 철충을 막아서고 있지만, 수적 열세로 인해 고전을 면치 못했다.

1000647329.english: There are too many Metal Parasite, I can't hold out any longer!
1000647329.korean: 철충이 너무 많아서 더는 버틸 수 없어요!

1000647331.english: Now that we've secured JangHwa, let's retreat for now!

1000647332.english: - The Mongoose team has returned, having broken through the Iron Plague.

1000647333.english: - But JangHwa remained still, cradled in HongRyeon's arms.
1000647333.korean: - 하지만 장화는 홍련에게 안긴 채, 아무런 미동도 하지 않았다.

1000647335.english: JangHwa is damaged. While protecting me, she...

1000647336.english: - HongRyeon had a look on her face as if she were about to burst into tears at any moment.
1000647336.korean: - 홍련은 금방이라도 울음을 터트릴 것만 같은 표정을 지었다.

1000647337.english: - I contacted the personnel on standby aboard the Orca and told them to prepare to treat JangHwa.
1000647337.korean: - 나는 오르카 호에 대기 중인 인원에게 장화를 치료할 준비를 하라고 연락했다.

1000647339.english: We'll stay and fight, so you and Draco should return first.
1000647339.korean: 저희는 남아서 전투에 참여할 테니, 드라코랑 먼저 복귀하세요.

1000647341.english: - HongRyeon immediately ran toward the Orca.
1000647341.korean: - 홍련은 곧바로 오르카 호를 향해 뛰어갔다.

1000647342.english: - I ordered everyone to retreat to the designated location.
1000647342.korean: - 나는 모두에게 지정된 장소까지 후퇴하도록 명령했다.

1000647343.english: - After a brief stalemate, Pinto's communication came through.
1000647343.korean: - 잠깐의 교착 끝에 핀토의 통신이 들어왔다.

1000647345.english: - I opened my mouth after confirming that all allies had retreated.
1000647345.korean: - 나는 모든 아군이 후퇴한 것을 확인하고 입을 열었다.

1000647346.english: - As soon as I finish speaking, a barrage of attacks rains down on the Metal Parasite.
1000647346.korean: - 내 말이 끝남과 동시에, 철충에게 폭격이 쏟아진다.

1000647347.english: - After the bombing stopped and the battlefield fell silent, it was filled only with ashes.
1000647347.korean: - 폭격이 멈추고 조용해진 전장에는 잿더미만 가득했다.

1000647348.english: All those Metal Parasite Beasts... at once...

1000647349.english: It's not over yet, we still need to deal with the ones who got away.
1000647349.korean: 아직 끝난 게 아니야, 빠져나온 녀석들도 처리해야 해.

1000647350.english: - I asked them to take care of the stragglers and returned to the Orca with the Mongoose team.
1000647350.korean: - 나는 잔당 처리를 부탁하고, 몽구스 팀과 오르카 호로 돌아갔다.

1000647352.english: - Upon arriving at the Orca, JangHwa was immediately treated.
1000647352.korean: - 오르카 호에 도착한 장화는 곧바로 치료받았다.

1000647353.english: - The treatment ended successfully, but JangHwa, perhaps because they were tired, just wouldn't wake up.
1000647353.korean: - 치료는 성공적으로 끝났지만, 장화는 지쳐있던 탓인지 좀처럼 깨어나지 않았다.

1000647354.english: - Just in case, we disarmed JangHwa and had the Mongoose team keep watch.
1000647354.korean: - 만일을 대비해 장화의 무장을 해제하고, 몽구스 팀이 감시하도록 했다.

1000647355.english: - How many days had passed? While I was working as usual, I heard a knock on the door.
1000647355.korean: - 며칠이 지났을까? 평소처럼 업무를 보던 중, 방문을 두드리는 소리가 들렸다.

1000647356.english: - The person who opened the door and came in was HongRyeon and...

1000647359.english: - As soon as she saw JangHwa, the adjutant protected me.

1000647360.english: I don't intend to be hostile anymore. If that were the case, they would have attacked as soon as they woke up.
1000647360.korean: 이제 적대할 생각은 없어. 그럴 거라면 깨어나자마자 공격했겠지.

1000647361.english: I just fell asleep because I was tired, there's no problem with moving.
1000647361.korean: 지쳐서 잠들었을 뿐, 움직이는 데는 아무런 문제 없어.

1000647362.english: - I gestured for the two people to sit down.

1000647363.english: What are you trying to say?

1000647364.english: I, as a member of the Emphrases Hound, a team that acts only for the Empress, terrorized the Angel faction.
1000647364.korean: 나는 여제님만을 위해 행동하는 팀, 엠프레시즈 하운드의 일원으로 앙헬 세력을 테러했어.

1000647365.english: I worked hard to be recognized by the Empress, but she never showed me the slightest bit of interest.
1000647365.korean: 여제님에게 인정받으려고 일했지만, 일말의 관심도 주지 않으셨지.

1000647366.english: The first day I met HongRyeon, it bothered me so much that she had the same face as me but was recognized by those around her.
1000647366.korean: 홍련을 처음 만난 날, 나와 같은 얼굴이면서 주변의 인정을 받는 모습이 너무나도 거슬렸어.

1000647367.english: I live enduring all kinds of contempt, while you were respected just for existing.
1000647367.korean: 나는 온갖 멸시를 당하며 사는데, 너는 존재만으로도 존경받았으니까.

1000647369.english: So that's why you were obsessed with me...

1000647370.english: Yeah, maybe it was just a way to vent.

1000647371.english: I was ordered to protect the Empress, and I fought to the very end.
1000647371.korean: 여제님을 지키라는 명령을 받고 끝까지 싸웠어.

1000647372.english: But sadly, the Empress fell into eternal slumber.

1000647373.english: After that, I wandered alone and eventually ended up here.
1000647373.korean: 그 후에는 혼자서 떠돌다가, 결국 이곳까지 오게 된 거야.

1000647374.english: I mostly acted alone, and even when I met up with the others, I only worked with them when I was given orders...
1000647374.korean: 나는 주로 혼자 행동했어, 다른 녀석들과 만나더라도 명령을 받았을 때만 같이 일했고...

1000647375.english: Beside, it's an organization just for the Empress. We had no way to contact each other, nor did we intend to.
1000647375.korean: 게다가 여제님만을 위한 조직이니까. 서로 연락할 방법도, 그럴 생각도 없었지.

1000647376.english: I don't know what orders those guys received at the end, so I can't tell how they'll act.
1000647376.korean: 그 녀석들이 마지막에 무슨 명령을 받았는지는 나도 몰라, 어떻게 행동할지 알 수 없어.

1000647377.english: - Just in case, I should also investigate the Empress Hound.
1000647377.korean: - 만일을 대비해서, 엠프레시즈 하운드에 대해서도 조사해야겠다.

1000647378.english: What does JangHwa plan to do now?

1000647379.english: Well, for now, I'll just keep living.
1000647379.korean: 글쎄, 일단은 계속 살아 갈 거야.

1000647380.english: But now that the Empress is gone, how am I supposed to fill this emptiness?
1000647380.korean: 하지만 여제님도 없는 지금, 이 공허함은 어떻게 채워야 할까.

1000647381.english: Even if the Empress who gave the orders isn't here, we have the Commander.
1000647381.korean: 명령을 내려주던 여제는 아니어도, 이곳엔 사령관님이 계세요.

1000647382.english: The attention and love I've been hoping for all this time, the commander will bestow upon me.
1000647382.korean: 그동안 바라왔던 관심과 사랑을, 사령관님께서 베풀어 주실 거예요.

1000647383.english: No matter what you've done, the commander will understand and cherish you.
1000647383.korean: 당신이 무슨 일을 저질렀던지, 사령관님은 이해해주시고 소중하게 대해주시니까요.

1000647385.english: - JangHwa and HongRyeon looked at me.

1000647386.english: You really trust that guy, don't you?

1000647387.english: The commander is always someone who worries about and cares for us.
1000647387.korean: 사령관님은 항상 우리를 걱정하고 아껴주시는 분이에요.

1000647388.english: They'll be there for you, sharing your burdens when things are tough and celebrating with you when things are good...
1000647388.korean: 힘든 일이 있으면 함께 나누고, 좋은 일이 있으면 함께 기뻐하며 곁에 있어 주실 테고...

1000647389.english: Don't worry, my children and I will be joining you as well.
1000647389.korean: 저와 제 아이들도 함께할 테니, 걱정하지 마세요.

1000647392.english: I'll take these JangHwa and head out now.

1000647395.english: - JangHwa stayed on the Orca and spent time with the Mongoose team.
1000647395.korean: - 장화는 오르카 호에 머물면서 몽구스 팀과 시간을 보냈다.

1000647396.english: - But just when I thought we were getting close, she expressed her intention to leave.
1000647396.korean: - 하지만 좀 친해졌다 싶었으나, 그녀는 떠나겠다고 의견을 표했다.

1000647397.english: - We prepared for them to leave, putting aside our feelings of regret.
1000647397.korean: - 우리는 아쉬운 마음을 뒤로한 채, 떠날 수 있도록 준비해줬다.

1000647398.english: The necessary supplies are in your backpack, so please take them.

1000647400.english: Could you please reconsider? Are you really going to leave?
1000647400.korean: 한 번 더 생각해 줄 수는 없나요? 정말 떠날 건가요?

1000647401.english: ...I have a lot of blood on my hands, and you're the only one who gets to be happy.
1000647401.korean: …내 손에 많은 피를 묻혔는데, 혼자만 행복해지다니.

1000647403.english: While we were together, I was happy, but it doesn't seem like it's the right time yet.
1000647403.korean: 함께하는 동안은 기뻤지만, 아직은 아닌 것 같아.

1000647404.english: We'll be staying here for a while, so please come by anytime you're having a hard time.
1000647404.korean: 우리는 당분간 이곳에 머물 테니까, 힘들 때는 언제든지 와주세요.

1000647406.english: Please take care of yourself and don't get involved in anything strange.
1000647406.korean: 부디 몸조심하고, 이상한 일에 휘말리지 말고-

1000647407.english: As if you were some kind of mother... Stop it, I'm leaving.
1000647407.korean: 무슨 엄마라도 되는 것처럼... 그만해, 갈 거야.

1000647410.english: - Going their separate ways, the two sisters bid farewell.
1000647410.korean: - 서로 다른 방향으로 나아가며, 두 자매는 이별을 맞이한다.

1000647411.english: - But on HongRyeon's returning face, there was a smile instead of sadness.
1000647411.korean: - 하지만 돌아오는 홍련의 얼굴에는 슬픔 대신 미소가 가득했다.

1000647412.english: It would be a lie to say I'm not disappointed.

1000647413.english: But it's okay. I'll be able to meet JangHwa again someday...
1000647413.korean: 하지만 괜찮아요. 장화와는 언젠가 다시 만날 수 있을 테니까...

1000647414.english: I can tell without you having to say anything.
1000647414.korean: 말하지 않아도 저는 알 수 있어요.

1000647415.english: JangHwa and I, like the commander and the children...

1000647417.english: < Roses Blooming on Lotus Flowers > END.

1000647418.english: Nice to meet you. Please take care of me too.

1000647419.english: Then. You can do whatever you want.

1000647423.english: ... HongRyeon, do you remember when you first joined the Orca?
1000647423.korean: ...홍련, 네가 오르카 호에 합류한지 얼마 안됐을 때 기억해?

1000647425.english: It's not too late yet. Let's change JangHwa's mind.
1000647425.korean: 아직 늦지 않았어. 장화의 마음을 돌리자.

1000647426.english: I haven't scouted the areas where the Iron Blobs are densely concentrated yet.
1000647426.korean: 철충이 밀집된 곳은 아직 정찰하지 못했어.

1000647428.english: ... Okay. Still, if you need help, feel free to ask anytime.

1000647429.english: There are Metal Parasite Ones nearby... There's still quite a bit left, tho.

1000647431.english: Can the Mongoose team handle the Metal Parasites on their own?
1000647431.korean: 철충은 몽구스 팀만으로 처리할 수 있겠어?

1000647433.english: I just heard a loud bang, what happened?

1000647434.english: JangHwa? Why not come to you guys?

1000647435.english: Okay. We're starting over here too.

1000647437.english: The main force will handle this, you guys rescue JangHwa.

1000647440.english: Take her to the Orca and get her treated.

1000647441.english: Pinto, please identify any isolated allies.

1000647443.english: Let's leave the rest to them and go back.

1000647446.english: Then, shall we talk for a moment?

1000647447.english: Before the Metal Parasites appeared, could you tell me how you lived?
1000647447.korean: 철충이 나타나기 전, 어떻게 살아왔는지 말해줄래?

1000647448.english: What happens after the Metal Parasite appear?

1000647449.english: You didn't go with your teammates?

1000647450.english: Will the Emphazis Hound be hostile toward us?

1000647451.english: Let's stay together for a while.

1000647452.english: Let me know if you need anything.

1000647454.english: This is going too far, Your Majesty. How could you play such a prank... ? I wasn't expecting it at all. That Your Majesty would think the same as I do... such affection is more than I deserve as a mother who feels endlessly inadequate. To repay that affection, I will from now on be even more devoted to Your Majesty... Yes? Even if we become husband and wife, my role will not change. The one who can handle Your Majesty... is only me.
1000647454.korean: 농담이 지나칩니다, 폐하. 어찌 이런 장난을 하십니까. …? 새, 생각도 못하고 있었습니다.&n폐하가… 저와 같은 생각을 하고 계실 줄은… 어미로서 한없이 모자란 저에겐 과분한 애정입니다.&n그 애정에 보답할 수 있도록, 앞으로는 더 철저히 폐하를 위해… 네? 부부 사이가 됐다고 하더라도&n제 역할엔 변함 없습니다. 폐하를 감당할 수 있는 것은… 저 뿐이니까요.

1000647455.english: You know, the reason I haven't called you Watson until now is because of the memory of the day we first met... I thought my feelings might get out of control. But I think I can stop that now. Yes, having held back until now, I'll express more and love more. Haha, it's more embarrassing than I thought. Still... I love you, Watson.
1000647455.korean: ...있지, 내가 그동안 왓슨이라고 부르지 않은 건 처음 만났던 그날의 추억 때문에…&n내 마음이 걷잡을 수 없어질 것 같아서였어. 그래도 이제는 안그래도 될 것 같아.&n응, 그동안 참아왔던 만큼, 더 많이 표현하고 더 많이 사랑할래. 아하하, 생각보다 부끄럽네. 그래도... 사랑해, 왓슨.

1000647456.english: My love for Master keeps growing before I can even repay the kindness I received... Even though my sisters helped me, I'm so anxious... What should I do— ...You say I can do as I wish? I always want to be held in Master's arms like this. And I want to share love with Master every day. Master feels the same way about me? I wasn't the only one. Truly, I really love you, Master.
1000647456.korean: 받은 은혜를 갚기도 전에 주인님을 사랑하는 마음이 자꾸 커져만가요…&n언니들께서 도와주셨는데도 너무나도 불안해서... 저는 어떻게 해야- ...하고 싶은 대로 하면 된다구요?&n항상 이렇게 주인님의 품에 안기고 싶어요. 그리고 매일 주인님과 사랑을 나누고 싶어요.&n주인님도 저와 같은 마음이라구요? 저만 그런 게 아니었군요. 정말, 정말 사랑해요. 주인님.

1000647458.english: - You might think this is utter nonsense, but it's actually true.
1000647458.korean: - 이게 대체 무슨 미친 소리인가 싶지만, 실제로 그렇다.

1000647459.english: - I don't know why, but among androids, there are quite a few who view their master or commander as a maternal figure... Of course, such androids are also on the Orca.
1000647459.korean: - 왜인지는 몰라도, 바이오로이드 중에는 주인이나 명령권자를 모성에 대상으로 보는 경우가 꽤 많은 편이고... 그런 바이오로이드들은 당연히 오르카 호에도 있다.

1000647460.english: - And those crew members express their affection for me in a maternal way.
1000647460.korean: - 그리고 그 대원들은 나에 대한 애정을 모성으로 표현한다.

1000647461.english: - Actually, when I'm resting and being held in your arms, I feel comfortable and all the worries of the world disappear, but... No, that's not what's important right now.
1000647461.korean: - 실제로 쉴 때 품에 안겨있으면 편안해지고, 세상 모든 걱정거리가 사라지긴 하지만... 아니, 지금은 그게 중요한 게 아니지.

1000647462.english: - The important thing is that I now have another mother.
1000647462.korean: - 중요한 건, 이번에 내게 또다른 엄마가 생겼다는 것이다.

1000647463.english: - Very... A mother with a unique personality.

1000647464.english: Your Majesty, you seem to have lost your focus.

1000647466.english: There's still a lot of time until mealtime. Before then, you must finish reviewing the first-half operational plan, the status of food distribution, and any welfare-related suggestions.
1000647466.korean: 식사 시간까지는 아직 많이 남았습니다. 그 전까지 상반기 작전 계획과 부식 배급 현황, 복지 관련 건의사항 검토를 끝내셔야 합니다.

1000647467.english: Alright, this mother has taken care of everything.

1000647468.english: - It was good that we restored Sekhmet, who will be a great asset with Cerestia's help.
1000647468.korean: - 세레스티아의 도움으로 큰 전력이 되어줄 세크메트를 복원한 것까진 좋았다.

1000647469.english: - After being restored, I didn't even mind bickering with Cerestia for a while.
1000647469.korean: - 복원된 뒤, 세레스티아와 한동안 티격태격 하는 것도 별로 신경쓰지 않았다.

1000647470.english: - After that, it wasn't until I thoroughly reviewed the records of my work for almost a month that I realized something was wrong, but...
1000647470.korean: - 그 뒤, 근 한 달동안 내 업무에 대한 기록을 샅샅히 훑어볼 때야 무언가 잘못되었다는 걸 깨달았지만...

1000647471.english: Your Majesty, where are you going?

1000647474.english: Your Majesty, I apologize. Have a good trip.

1000647475.english: - I fled the captain's cabin and headed for the men's restroom.
1000647475.korean: - 도망치듯 함장실을 빠져나와 남자 화장실로 향했다.

1000647476.english: - It's not unusual for the team members to be around or help out during work, but this is... well...
1000647476.korean: - 업무중에 대원들이 곁에 있거나 일을 돕는 것은 이상한 일도 아니지만, 이렇게 뭐랄까...

1000647477.english: - And a bit overzealous at that...

1000647478.english: - Sighing softly, I entered the bathroom, and a familiar face greeted me with a smile.
1000647478.korean: - 작게 한숨을 내쉬며 화장실로 들어가자, 익숙한 얼굴이 웃으며 반겨줬다.

1000647483.english: - After a brief struggle, I finally managed to get some time alone and then ran into Cerestia again, who was waiting in front of the bathroom.
1000647483.korean: - 잠시 실랑이를 벌인 뒤 간신히 혼자만의 시간을 보내고, 화장실 앞에서 기다리고 있던 세레스티아와 다시 마주했다.

1000647486.english: - Cerestia smiled gently and softly stroked a flower growing on the hallway wall.
1000647486.korean: - 세레스티아는 싱긋 웃으며 복도 벽에 자라고 있는 꽃 한송이를 부드럽게 쓰다듬었다.

1000647487.english: - I don't know what they did, but it's growing fresh, stuck to the metal wall.
1000647487.korean: - 대체 무슨 수를 쓴 건지, 금속 벽에 붙은 채로 싱싱하게 자라고 있다.

1000647488.english: ... I think obsession arises from a sense of lack.

1000647489.english: If you love life more than anyone else, but all you can do is kill... What do you think it will be like?
1000647489.korean: 누구보다도 생명을 사랑하는데 죽이는 일밖에 하지 못한다면... 어떨 것 같으세요?

1000647490.english: - I remembered Sekhmet's ability, which I had read about in the information, to instantly decompose organic matter.
1000647490.korean: - 정보에서 보았던, 유기물을 순식간에 분해해버리는 세크메트의 능력이 떠올랐다.

1000647491.english: Hehe, please don't think it's too annoying and look at it kindly~
1000647491.korean: 후후, 너무 성가시다고 생각하지 마시고 예쁘게 봐주세요~

1000647492.english: - When I asked why Sekhmet was calling me "Your Majesty," Cerestia tilted her head.
1000647492.korean: - 세크메트가 왜 나를 폐하라고 부르는지 묻자, 세레스티아는 고개를 갸웃했다.

1000647493.english: Hmm... Just a moment... It's on the tip of my tongue...
1000647493.korean: 으음... 잠시만요... 기억이 날 듯 말듯...

1000647494.english: Oh, Sekhmet and I are destined to serve our master as king... I think I threw it, too~?
1000647494.korean: 아, 저랑 세크메트는 주인을 왕으로 모시게 되어있... 던 것 같기도 하고요~?

1000647495.english: Then shall we do that now, Your Majesty?

1000647496.english: Or, Your Majesty? Hehe, come and hug your mother, dear.

1000647497.english: And this is something I'm telling you specifically... When you go back to Sekhmet, try saying this once:
1000647497.korean: 그리고 이건 특별히 알려드리는 건데요... 세크메트한테 돌아가면 이렇게 한 번 말해보세요~

1000647499.english: - After being held captive by Cerestia for a while and then escaping, when I returned to the captain's cabin, Sekhmet was waiting, radiating coldness.
1000647499.korean: - 한동안 세레스티아에게 붙잡혀 있다 탈출한 뒤 함장실로 돌아오자, 세크메트가 냉기를 풀풀 날리며 기다리고 있었다.

1000647500.english: I was just about to go out and look for you because I was worried.

1000647502.english: ......! Are you hungry? This mother didn't think of that.
1000647502.korean: ......! 시장하신 것입니까. 이 어미가 미처 생각하지 못했습니다.

1000647503.english: I'll get the ingredients right away and prepare the meal, so please wait just a little while.
1000647503.korean: 금방 재료를 구해와 식사를 준비할테니 조금만 기다려주세요.

1000647504.english: I checked previously, but it wasn't available.

1000647505.english: - Watching Sekhmet get up and start preparing to leave... No, when did you set up house in my room like this?
1000647505.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 주섬주섬 나갈 준비를 하는 세크메트의 모습을 보며... 아니, 언제 이렇게 내 방에 살림을 차려놓은거지?

1000647506.english: - Just as Cerestia said a moment ago...

1000647508.english: When you go back to Sekhmet, try saying this:
1000647508.korean: 세크메트한테 돌아가면 이렇게 한 번 말해보세요~

1000647509.english: I'm hungry, do you have anything to eat?

1000647510.english: It will definitely help build relationships.
1000647510.korean: 관계를 쌓는데에 분명히 도움이 될 거예요.

1000647511.english: A little... You might be surprised, but...

1000647513.english: - Even though her last remark really bothers me, I guess I'll just have to wait and see.
1000647513.korean: - 마지막 말이 몹시 신경쓰이긴 하지만, 일단 지켜봐야겠군.

1000647514.english: It's heartwarming that you're worried about your mother, but I'm fine. Because you'll be able to get it right nearby.
1000647514.korean: 어미를 걱정해주는 마음은 기쁘지만 괜찮습니다. 근처에서 바로 구할 수 있을테니까요.

1000647518.english: - Whatever had happened, Sekhmet, covered in grass, immediately headed for the kitchen upon returning.
1000647518.korean: - 무슨 일이 있었는지, 풀잎 투성이가 되어 돌아온 세크메트는 곧바로 주방으로 향했다.

1000647519.english: - The emergency bell directly connecting the galley to the captain's cabin is silent, so it seems nothing serious has happened for now...
1000647519.korean: - 주방에서 함장실로 직통으로 연결되는 비상벨이 잠잠한 걸 보면 일단 별 일은 없는 모양인데...

1000647520.english: - The work was finished long ago, and after spending some time rummaging through the ship's database and messenger...
1000647520.korean: - 일은 진작에 끝냈고, 함내 데이터베이스와 메신저를 뒤적이길 얼마간.

1000647521.english: - Finally, the captain's cabin door opened, and the smell of food wafted out.
1000647521.korean: - 마침내 음식 냄새와 함께 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000647522.english: I apologize for being late, Your Majesty. I brought the meal.

1000647524.english: Are you perhaps not satisfied? Then, another dish...
1000647524.korean: 혹시 마음에 안드시는 건가요? 그럼 다른 요리를...

1000647525.english: - A dark, amorphous mass with a metaphysical form sits in the center of the plate, and from its excavated core, crimson granules erupt like lava.
1000647525.korean: - 형이상학적인 형태를 띈 거무튀튀한 덩어리가 접시 가운데에 자리 잡고 있고, 파헤쳐진 중심부에서는 시뻘건 알갱이들이 용암처럼 분출하고 있다.

1000647526.english: - And around it, mysterious bright yellow masses lined up in circles at regular intervals...
1000647526.korean: - 그리고 그 둘레에 일정한 간격으로 원을 그리며 늘어선 정체불명의 샛노란 덩어리들...

1000647528.english: - After hesitating for a while, the words I finally spoke froze Sekhmet in place like a still image.
1000647528.korean: - 한동안 망설이다 꺼낸 말에 세크메트는 정지화면처럼 딱 굳었다.

1000647529.english: I'm sorry, Your Majesty. It seems this mother was still lacking.
1000647529.korean: 죄송합니다, 폐하. 이 어미로서는 아직 역부족이었나 봅니다.

1000647530.english: I will strive harder, so for the time being, it would be best for you to eat the meals prepared by Miss Sowan as usual.
1000647530.korean: 좀 더 정진할테니, 당분간은 원래대로 소완 양이 준비한 식사를 드시는 것이 좋겠습니다.

1000647531.english: - As she said that and reached to clear the plates, a hint of disappointment flashed in Sekhmet's eyes.
1000647531.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 접시를 치우려는 세크메트의 눈빛에 얼핏 섭섭함이 스쳤다.

1000647532.english: - Although I haven't experienced much yet, I can definitely tell that Sekhmet's maternal love and her sincere desire to fulfill her role, even if she's clumsy, are genuine.
1000647532.korean: - 아직 많이 겪어보진 못했지만, 세크메트의 모성애와 서툴면서도 어떻게든 역할을 해내려는 마음은 진심이라는 것은 충분히 알 수 있다.

1000647533.english: - Saying that, I picked up something that looked like wings with trembling hands.
1000647533.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 떨리는 손으로 날개처럼 보이는 것을 집었다.

1000647534.english: - Okay. At least it smells good. Hypnotizing myself, I put the greasy meat in my mouth.
1000647534.korean: - 그래. 일단 냄새는 좋잖아. 스스로에게 최면을 걸며 기름기가 흐르는 고기를 입에 넣었다.

1000647535.english: Your Majesty, is that really true?

1000647536.english: - A taste I've never experienced before. The meat, well-infused with garlic and aroma, chews with a satisfyingly chewy texture.
1000647536.korean: - 한 번도 맛보지 못한 맛. 간과 향이 잘 배어든 고기가 쫀득하게 씹힌다.

1000647537.english: Please eat with us. Here's a spoon.

1000647538.english: - I took a large spoonful of rice and, while marveling at its exquisite taste, met Sekhmet's eyes, who was looking at me with such a proud expression.
1000647538.korean: - 밥을 한 술 크게 입에 밀어 넣고, 그 신묘한 맛에 감탄하는 동안 나를 너무나 뿌듯한 눈으로 바라보고 있는 세크메트와 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000647541.english: - No, it's more accurate to say I don't even know if it exists or not.
1000647541.korean: - 아니, 정확히는 있는지 없는지도 모른다가 맞겠지.

1000647542.english: - There are many grateful and lovely members who are willing to take on that role for me, but... I have no memories of my childhood, nor of my mother.
1000647542.korean: - 그 역할을 대신 해주려는, 고맙고 사랑스러운 대원들은 많지만... 어린 시절의 기억도, 어머니에 대한 기억도 내게는 없다.

1000647543.english: - But Sekhmet's proud gaze made me think, if I really had a mother, this is what it would feel like... I thought to myself.
1000647543.korean: - 하지만 세크메트의 뿌듯한 눈빛에, 만약 진짜 엄마가 있었다면 이런 느낌이지 않을까... 하는 생각이 들었다.

1000647545.english: - After finishing our late dinner, Sekhmet, who had retrieved all her toiletries from a corner of the captain's cabin, called me.
1000647545.korean: - 늦은 저녁 식사를 마치고 난 뒤, 함장실 구석에서 세면도구 일체를 꺼내온 세크메트가 나를 불렀다.

1000647546.english: Your Majesty, you should wash before you go to sleep.

1000647547.english: This mother will wash you herself.

1000647548.english: - Although my body instinctively resisted at first due to past experiences, I didn't actually feel much like resisting.
1000647548.korean: - 지금까지 학습된 경험들 때문에 반사적으로 몸이 먼저 저항하긴 했지만, 실제로 저항할 기분은 별로 들지 않았다.

1000647549.english: - I obediently followed her to the bathroom, washed, and then lay down on the bed, letting my body sink into her soft skin.
1000647549.korean: - 순순히 욕실로 따라가 씻은 뒤, 침대에 누워 부드러운 살결에 몸을 맡겼다.

1000647551.english: - Aside from a few minor issues, I was ultimately able to fall asleep feeling warm for the first time in a long while.
1000647551.korean: - 몇 가지 사소한 문제만 빼면, 결과적으로 오랜만에 따뜻한 기분을 느끼며 잠들 수 있었다.

1000647552.english: - Skin that ached from being scrubbed too hard with a shower towel, or eyes that stung until I fell asleep because shampoo got in them.
1000647552.korean: - 샤워타올로 너무 세게 문질려서 욱신거리는 피부나, 샴푸가 들어가서 잠들때까지 따끔거렸던 눈.

1000647553.english: - Except for the minor issues, like you checking every ten minutes to see if I was sleeping well, which made me toss and turn a bit. Compared to the kindness I received, those are very trivial problems.
1000647553.korean: - 내가 잘 자고 있는지 10분에 한 번씩 확인하는 바람에 조금 잠을 설쳤다는, 내가 받은 마음에 비하면 아주 사소한 문제들만 빼면.

1000647557.english: I need to go to the bathroom...

1000647558.english: I've managed to get out for now, but...

1000647559.english: Should I say she's like a real mother?

1000647563.english: What can I help you with?

1000647567.english: I didn't think it was annoying... Oh, right.
1000647567.korean: 성가시다고는 생각 안 했어... 아, 맞다.

1000647568.english: Cerestia doesn't call it that, does she- uh.

1000647569.english: Sorry. You've been waiting a long time, haven't you?

1000647570.english: That's... I'm hungry, so I was looking to see if there was anything to eat...
1000647570.korean: 그게... 배, 배고파서 뭐 먹을게 있나 하고...

1000647571.english: It should have just about everything, right?

1000647574.english: But it seems the ingredients are incredibly rare. Can I go alone?
1000647574.korean: 근데 재료가 엄청 희귀한건가보네. 혼자 가도 되겠어?

1000647576.english: I'm starting to get really hungry...

1000647578.english: This is... Hmm... Um, what was it...

1000647579.english: It's not that kind of problem...

1000647580.english: This... Is it some kind of resurrection ritual...?
1000647580.korean: 이거... 무슨 부활 의식 같은 거야...?

1000647582.english: Sorry. I spoke without thinking too much. A little... No, I was surprised.
1000647582.korean: 미안. 내가 너무 생각없이 말했어. 조금... 노, 놀라서.

1000647590.english: Good night to you too, Sekhmet.

1000647591.english: - We gathered for a meeting at Marie's request. The meeting topic is about the structures found in various locations, including near the base.
1000647591.korean: - 마리의 요청으로 회의를 하기 위해 모였다. 회의 주제는 거점 인근을 비롯한 여러 장소에서 발견된 구조물에 대해서.

1000647592.english: - I recall approving a few reconnaissance missions in that regard.
1000647592.korean: - 그와 관련해 몇 건인가 정찰 임무를 승인했던 기억이 난다.

1000647593.english: Your Excellency, as I mentioned earlier, I would like to discuss the recently discovered structure.
1000647593.korean: 각하, 먼저 말씀드렸던 것처럼 최근 발견된 구조물에 대해 상의드리려고 합니다.

1000647594.english: First, we discovered several communities near the structure, and after several reconnaissance missions, we determined that these communities were mining facilities for the Iron Bugs...
1000647594.korean: 우선 구조물 인근에서 공동 여럿을 발견했으며, 몇 차례의 정찰 결과 해당 공동은 철충들의 채광 시설...

1000647595.english: In other words, it was revealed to be a mine. They also brought something refined out of the structure.
1000647595.korean: 즉, 광산인 것으로 밝혀졌습니다. 또한 구조물에서 정제된 무언가를 가지고 나왔습니다.

1000647596.english: Although we failed to enter the structure and the mine due to the enemy patrol...
1000647596.korean: 적의 순찰대 때문에 구조물과 광산 내부로 진입하는 데에는 실패했지만...

1000647597.english: It is not that there were no results. This is a piece of ore that Griffon found near the entrance leading underground.
1000647597.korean: 성과가 없던 것은 아닙니다. 이것은 그리폰이 지하로 통하는 입구 근처에서 발견한 광석 조각입니다.

1000647598.english: The Iron Bugs periodically emerged from underground and carried these into the structure.
1000647598.korean: 철충들이 주기적으로 지하에서 나와, 이것들을 구조물 안으로 운반했습니다.

1000647599.english: - Marie pointed to a golden, shimmering stone fragment on the table.
1000647599.korean: - 마리가 테이블 위에서 금빛으로 빛나는 돌조각을 가리켰다.

1000647600.english: - Even I, who lack knowledge in this field, can see that it doesn't look like something from Earth.
1000647600.korean: - 이쪽 방면으로는 지식이 부족한 내가 봐도 지구의 것이 아닌 것처럼 보인다.

1000647602.english: It seems like we won't be able to get proper results with just this small piece. I need more time...
1000647602.korean: 아무래도 이런 조그만 조각 하나만으로는 제대로 된 결과를 얻기 힘들어. 시간도 더 필요하고...

1000647603.english: What, you brought even this little thing in that situation? That's something!
1000647603.korean: 뭐야, 그 상황에서 요만한 것이라도 가져온 게 어디야!

1000647604.english: It was a huge help that Griffon gave me even this.
1000647604.korean: 그리폰 언니가 이거라도 가져와줘서 엄청 도움이 됐어.

1000647606.english: Still, it's not like we didn't figure anything out. This ore can form compounds with all elements and compounds...
1000647606.korean: 그래도 아무것도 못 알아낸 건 아니야. 이 광석은 모든 원소와 혼화합물을 만들 수 있는데...

1000647607.english: It's possible not only with ferrous metals but also with semimetals like silicon and germanium, and even with nonmetals like oxygen and carbon.
1000647607.korean: 철 같은 금속류는 물론이고 준금속인 규소나 게르마늄, 심지어 산소와 탄소처럼 비금속과도 가능해.

1000647608.english: Even more surprising is that the mixtures of this ore change their original properties, such as the molecular bond structure changing...
1000647608.korean: 더 놀라운 것은 이 광석의 혼화합물은 본래의 성질이 변하는데, 분자의 결합 구조가 바뀌는 등...

1000647609.english: Can you say it in our language?

1000647610.english: Well, to put it simply, it's like the Philosopher's Stone. Strictly speaking, the Philosopher's Stone is a catalyst for turning base metals into gold, but...
1000647610.korean: 음, 쉽게 말하면 현자의 돌 같은 거야. 엄밀하게 말하자면 현자의 돌은 값싼 금속을 금으로 바꾸기 위한 촉매지만...

1000647612.english: Hehe, for example, when iron is alloyed, it becomes harder, just like carbon steel. And it turned black instead of silver.
1000647612.korean: 헤헷, 예를 들면 철과 합금하면 마치 탄소강처럼 더 단단해져. 그리고 은색을 띠지 않고 검은색으로 변했어.

1000647613.english: And this is... These are the materials Fatima shared with me about that point.
1000647613.korean: 그리고 이건... 파티마에게 그 점에 관해 공유 받은 자료야.

1000647614.english: - The data Dr. gave me showed that Saman Industries had researched ore and found that it could combine with all elements on the current periodic table, and...
1000647614.korean: - 닥터가 건넨 자료에는 삼안 산업에서 광석을 연구한 것으로 현 주기율표 상의 모든 원소와 결합이 가능하는 것과...

1000647615.english: - It is written that the ore was named 'Alterium' because it changed the properties of the combined substances.
1000647615.korean: - 결합된 물질의 특성을 바꾼다는 이유로 광석의 이름을 '알터리움'으로 명명했다는 내용이 적혀있다.

1000647616.english: Also, if you provide Fatima with an alterium, she says she will cover the cost of some of the items.
1000647616.korean: 또한 파티마에게 알터리움을 제공해주면 일부 물품의 대금을 자신이 부담하겠다고 합니다.

1000647617.english: If you capture this place, I'm sure I can let you go.
1000647617.korean: 이곳을 점령하면 충분히 보내줄 수 있을 거야.

1000647618.english: Of course, more research is needed on the purification method and how to apply it, but...
1000647618.korean: 물론 정제하는 방식과 어떻게 적용할지에 대해 연구가 더 필요하겠지만...

1000647619.english: Oh! And it seems the Iron Bugs Ones are strengthening themselves thru the Alterium.
1000647619.korean: 아! 그리고 철충은 알터리움을 통해 스스로를 강화하는 것으로 보여.

1000647620.english: Yes, Your Excellency. So, I'd like to propose a plan.
1000647620.korean: 그렇습니다, 각하. 그래서 작전을 하나 제안드리려고 합니다.

1000647621.english: - Marie handed over the documents. Below the title, the operation objectives, estimated time required, necessary supplies, and personnel selection details are listed one after another.
1000647621.korean: - 마리가 서류를 내밀었다. 제목 아래로 작전목표와 예상 소요 시간, 필요한 물자, 인원 차출 내역등이 줄줄이 적혀있다.

1000647622.english: We are forming a unit and planning an operation to occupy this area.
1000647622.korean: 부대를 구성해 이 지역을 점령할 작전을 짜고 있습니다.

1000647623.english: There are a few problems. First, a large number of Iron Bugs are detected within the structure.
1000647623.korean: 몇 가지 문제가 있습니다. 일단 구조물 내에 많은 철충이 감지됩니다.

1000647624.english: Furthermore, it's difficult to gage how deep the mine is and how many Iron Bugs are inside.
1000647624.korean: 게다가 광산이 얼마나 깊은지, 그 안에 철충이 어느 정도 있는지 파악하기 힘들어.

1000647625.english: Still, it seems there are no other exits, so if we block the entrance, they won't be able to escape.
1000647625.korean: 그래도 다른 출입구가 없는 듯하니까 입구를 봉쇄하면 새어 나가지는 않을 거야.

1000647626.english: Therefore, we plan to attack by sealing the entrance and repeatedly infiltrating and regrouping.
1000647626.korean: 그렇기에 입구를 봉쇄하고, 침투와 재정비를 반복하는 식으로 공략하고자 합니다.

1000647627.english: It seems like it will be okay. First, the map...

1000647628.english: - Marie pointed to the operational area map attached to the documents.
1000647628.korean: - 마리가 서류에 첨부된 작전지역 지도를 가리켰다.

1000647629.english: It seems to be an important facility for the Iron Bugs as well, but there are no Iron Bugs forces in this area, and it's the same in other regions.
1000647629.korean: 철충들에게도 중요한 시설인 듯하나 이 근방에는 철충 세력이 없고, 다른 지역도 마찬가지입니다.

1000647630.english: It seems the main force isn't coming separately, and only the guard troops are stationed here...
1000647630.korean: 따로 본대가 찾아오지 않고 경비 병력만이 상주하는 것으로 보이니...

1000647631.english: First, it seems best to occupy this place and then observe the movements of the Iron Blood.
1000647631.korean: 우선 이곳을 점령한 후에 철충의 동태를 살피는 것이 좋을 듯합니다.

1000647632.english: Okay. There's no problem with reconnaissance either.

1000647633.english: I'll let you know if I find anything.

1000647635.english: - It's advantageous if we can cut off the Iron Beetle's important resources and strengthen our power. This time, we have to take a risk.
1000647635.korean: - 철충의 중요 자원을 끊고, 전력을 강화할 수 있다면 이득이다. 이번엔 위험을 감수해야 한다.

1000647636.english: Let me know as soon as it's occupied, Marie. I'll prepare a few things and come too. I need to take a look at the fairness structure.
1000647636.korean: 점령되는 대로 알려줘, 마리 언니. 나도 여러가지 준비하고 갈게. 공정구조를 살펴봐야겠어.

1000647637.english: Could you tell me the reason?

1000647638.english: We don't know what might happen if we use the Iron Insect's equipment, and wouldn't it be great if we could mine and refine it with our own technology?
1000647638.korean: 철충의 장비를 사용하다가는 무슨 일이 생길지 모르고, 우리 기술로 채굴에서 정제까지 할 수 있으면 좋잖아.

1000647639.english: If that's the reason... Your Excellency?

1000647640.english: Yes, Your Excellency. We'll be leaving too.

1000647641.english: If that's the case, it would be an important resource for the Iron Bugs Ones as well.

1000647642.english: Will there be any setbacks in carrying out the operation?

1000647643.english: Won't it attract the attention of the Iron Beasts?

1000647650.english: Until now, it was just Sia and me alone, living with the sole goal of survival. But... in a ruined world, and on the opposite side of the globe... I never expected to meet the person of my destiny, Commander. As I said at the beginning, thank you for taking us in. And thank you for loving me. ...I really love you too.
1000647650.korean: 저는 지금껏 시아랑 단 둘이, 오로지 살아남는 것만을 목표로 살아왔습니다. 그런데...&n멸망한 세상에서, 그것도 지구 반대편에서… 제 운명의 사람을 만나게 될 줄은 정말 몰랐어요.​ 사령관님.&n처음에도 말씀드렸지만, 저희를 받아주셔서 감사합니다. 그리고 저를 사랑해주셔서 감사합니다. ...저도, 정말로 사랑해요.

1000647651.english: Wow...! Sia, you know this means you give it to the person you really like and then mar...ry them, right? ...Ah. But Sia doesn't have this. What should I do... Huh? Sia doesn't have to give it? But Sia really, really likes the squad leader... Is it really okay not to give it...? Hmm... then, then... Ah! Then instead, Sia will grant all of the squad leader's wishes.
1000647651.korean: 와아...! 시아 이거 알아. 엄~청 좋아하는 사람한테 주고 결... 혼? 하는거지? ...아. 근데&n시아는 이거 없어. 어떡하지... 응? 시아는 안 줘도 돼? 그치만 시아, 전단장님 엄~청 좋아하는데...&n진짜로 안 줘도 돼...? 으응... 그러면, 그러면... 아! 그러면 대신 시아가 전단장님 소원 전~부 들어줄게.

1000647652.english: Are you giving this to me? Really? Really? Amazing! Something I've only seen in comics is happening to me too. ...Although it's a common tale, it's actually the moment I've been longing for. Now that I know the Commander feels the same as I do... ehehe! It's embarrassing. Thank you for making today a special day.
1000647652.korean: ...저에게 주시는 거예요? 진짜? 진짜루? 대박! 만화에서나 보던 일이 저한테도 일어났네요.&n...흔하디 흔한 이야기긴 한데, 사실 제가 바라오던 순간이에요. 사령관님도 저랑 똑같은 마음이란 걸&n알게 되니 뭔가... 에헤헷! 낯간지럽네요. 오늘을 특별한 날로 만들어 주셔서 감사해요.

1000647653.english: Th-this... Master... I'm really happy. Thetis will be a maid solely for Master she truly loves from now on. ...You expected me to say that? Kyahaha, there's no way I would— why are you so moved?! This is just... just a joke... B-but a little of it was sincere. The part... 'truly love' before 'I will be a maid only for Master.'
1000647653.korean: 이건... 주, 주인님... 정말 기뻐요. 테티스는 앞으로, 정말 좋아하는 주인님만을 위한 메이드가&n될게요. ...라고 할 줄 아셨어요? 꺄하핫, 제가 그럴리가- 왜, 왜 그렇게 감동하시는 거예요?!&n이런 거 그냥… 그냥, 장난인데… 그, 그래도 아주 조금은 진심이었어요. 그...&n'주인님만을 위한 메이드가 될게요.' 앞에... '정말 좋아하는' 부분요.​

1000647659.english: It's been such a long time since I came here. Back then we were commander and subordinate, but now like this— this ring... you wanted to show your heart again? Hehe. I wondered why you asked to borrow a wedding ring, and so this was the reason... I have always loved you, dear. So... shall we return to our newlywed days for tonight?
1000647659.korean: 이곳에 오는 것도 정말 오랜만이네요. 그때는 사령관과 부하라는 관계였는데, 지금은 이렇게-&n이 반지는... 마음을 다시 보여주고 싶었다구요? 후후. 무슨 일로 결혼 반지를 빌려달라고 말했는지&n궁금했는데, 이런 이유였다니... 저도 언제나 여보를 사랑하고 있어요. 그러니... 오늘만큼은 신혼 때로 돌아가볼까요?

1000647666.english: The only ones you can speak honorifically about in front of me are the Chairmen. Same goes for titles. Got it?
1000647666.korean: 내 앞에서 높임말을 붙일 수 있는 사람은 회장님들뿐이야. 존칭도 마찬가지고. 알겠어?

1000647668.english: If you’re done preparing, then wait outside.

1000647670.english: What’s this. Have we started already?

1000647671.english: Please keep quiet, Gamma. I’m the one presiding over this meeting.
1000647671.korean: 정숙하세요, 감마. 회의를 주관하는 건 저예요.

1000647675.english: Ah, sorry. You heard that? I meant for you to hear it, but I was worried you might not feel as offended as you should!
1000647675.korean: 아, 미안. 들렸어? 들으라고 한 소리긴 한데, 기분이 덜 상했을까봐 걱정되네.

1000647676.english: So what I want to say is... Omega, I wish you'd know your place. You bitch — you missed Chairman Moonriver's perfect chance to reborn!
1000647676.korean: 그러니까 내가 하고 싶은 말은... 오메가, 네가 좀 분수를 알았으면 좋겠다는 거야. 문리버 회장님이 깨어날 절호의 기회를 놓친 네년이.

1000647677.english: ...I’ve explained it over and over. Because that so-called ‘Iron Prince’ intervened—
1000647677.korean: ...몇 번이고 설명했을텐데요. '철의 왕자'라고 하는 자가 끼어드는 바람에-

1000647678.english: Ha! You lost to Alpha and even abandoned Cestus Hymas before running off, and yet you still flap your mouth.
1000647678.korean: 하! 알파 따위한테 밀려서 케스토스 히마스까지 버리고 도망친 주제에 입만 살았네.

1000647681.english: This is a rare meeting, so—

1000647684.english: About that matter I asked of you last time—what’s the status?
1000647684.korean: 저번에 제가 부탁드린 건 어떻게 됐죠?

1000647688.english: Out of the 273 planned sites, we’ve completed construction of factories at 241. 27 are under construction, and the remaining 5 just had the land secured.
1000647688.korean: 예정됐던 273곳 중 241개 장소에 공장 건설을 마쳤고, 27개 장소는 시공 중. 남은 5곳은 지역확보만 완료했어요.

1000647689.english: Hm... is that so? Seems things are proceeding smoothly. Well done, Zeta.
1000647689.korean: 흠... 그래요? 순조롭게 진행되고 있나 보네요. 잘하셨어요, 제타.

1000647699.english: Haha! Still the same sleepyhead. Let’s just move on.
1000647699.korean: 하하! 잠꾸러기인 건 여전하군. 그냥 진행하자고. 어차피 관심도 없을테고.

1000647701.english: Then, moving on to the main agen—

1000647703.english: Excuse me. The chair collapsed. Must’ve been unbalanced.
1000647703.korean: 실례. 의자가 무너졌네요. 균형이 안 맞아서 그런가.

1000647704.english: Still pestering, are you? What a vile hobby. By now you should’ve had your fill.
1000647704.korean: 아직도 괴롭히고 있나? 악취미구만. 그쯤되면 분이 풀릴 때도 되지 않았어?

1000647706.english: Do you even know what kind of days I had to endure when you stupid bitches stole the Chairman’s favor away from me?
1000647706.korean: 이 암캐들이 회장님의 총애를 뺏어갔을 때 내가 어떤 나날을 보냈는지 네가 알기나 해?

1000647707.english: Oops! Touched a nerve, did I.

1000647708.english: If you ever come to Europe, give me a call. I’ll make sure to give you one hell of a welcome...!
1000647708.korean: 유럽에 올 일 있으면 연락하고 와. 성대하게 환영해 줄 테니까...!

1000647709.english: Yeah, yeah. Got it. Now try to rein in that venom of yours.
1000647709.korean: 그래, 그래. 알았으니까 그 독기좀 어떻게 해 봐.

1000647710.english: That’s enough, both of you! You do understand how important today’s agenda is, don’t you?
1000647710.korean: 두 분 다 그쯤해두세요. 오늘 회의가 얼마나 중요한 안건을 다루는지 모르시는 건 아니죠?

1000647712.english: Of course. How could I not.

1000647713.english: That’s right, Gamma. You of all people shouldn’t be ignorant of it.
1000647713.korean: 맞아요, 감마. 당신이 몰라선 안 되죠.

1000647714.english: I entrusted you with internal affairs for a while to reinforce our forces, and what were you doing while things fell apart like this?
1000647714.korean: 전력을 보강하기 위해 잠깐 내정을 맡겼더니, 일이 이 지경이 될 때까지 뭘 하고 있었던 거예요?

1000647715.english: Why make a fuss over nothing?
1000647715.korean: 별것도 아닌 거 가지고 뭘 그래?

1000647716.english: Just some video of a human and their slaves singing and dancing on stage—what’s the big deal.
1000647716.korean: 인간 하나랑 그 노예들이 무대 위에서 춤추고 노래하는 영상이 뭔 대수라고.

1000647717.english: Do you even know how many more traitors that so-called “nothing” of a video created as it spread?
1000647717.korean: 그 별것도 아닌 영상이 퍼지는 바람에 배신자들이 얼마나 늘어났는지는 알아요?

1000647718.english: Their numbers keep growing, and even if we suppress it, copies spread—
1000647718.korean: 갈수록 더 늘어나고, 통제해봤자 사본이 퍼져서-

1000647719.english: And so what? Doesn’t matter anyway! You’ve been taking care of them as soon as they’re found.
1000647719.korean: 그래봤자 상관없잖아. 어차피 발견하는 대로 네가 처리하고 있고.

1000647720.english: I don’t like it either, but I agree with Gamma. If they’re going to betray us, they better do it quickly.
1000647720.korean: 맘에 들진 않아도 나도 감마랑 같은 의견이야. 배신할거면 빨리 하는게 나아.

1000647721.english: And... if they want to leave, let them. We can always make replacements.
1000647721.korean: 그리고... 갈 거면 가라고 해. 대신할 것들은 얼마든지 만들 수 있어.

1000647722.english: Bioroids have to follow human orders... they can’t help it...
1000647722.korean: 바이오로이드는 인간의 명령을 따라야 하니까... 그들도 어쩔 수 없을 거예요...

1000647723.english: So maybe we should think twice before resorting to summary executions...
1000647723.korean: 그러니 즉결처형하는 건 한번 더 생각을...

1000647727.english: Is that so? So Beta and Zeta both think that way.
1000647727.korean: 그래요? 베타랑 제타는 그렇게 생각하나 보군요.

1000647732.english: Then let’s end the meeting here. For the time being, I’ll personally lead the guards and root out the traitors.
1000647732.korean: 그럼 이번 회의는 여기서 끝내도록 하죠. 당분간은 제가 직접 친위대를 이끌고 배신자들을 솎아내겠어요.

1000647733.english: Do as you like. I’ll be in Europe anyway—

1000647734.english: No! Make sure it’s done properly.

1000647736.english: Hm. Well then, I’ll take my leave too. Seems I’ve found something interesting...!
1000647736.korean: 흐음. 그럼 나도 가보지. 재미있는 걸 발견한 것 같거든...!

1000647739.english: Um, Omega... about summary executions, I really think you should reconsider...
1000647739.korean: 저기, 오메가... 역시 즉결처형은 다시 한번 생각을...

1000647740.english: Beta, you should leave as well.

1000647747.english: None of them... not a single one of those bitches understands what truly matters for when the Chairmen awaken...!
1000647747.korean: 이놈이고, 저놈이고... 회장님들이 다시 깨어날 때 중요한 게 뭔지 하나도 모르는 년들이...!

1000647748.english: If not for Alpha—if only that human had been captured back then, the Chairmen would already have been resurrected!
1000647748.korean: 알파, 그년만 아니었으면...! 그때 그 인간만 포획했으면 지금쯤 회장님들께서 부활하셨을 텐데!

1000647750.english: Looks like... an example needs to be made. Since it’s been traced that the video spread from Virginia, I’ll execute the residents there to instill some fear.
1000647750.korean: 아무래도... 본보기가 필요할 것 같군요. 버지니아 주에서 영상이 확산된 게 밝혀졌으니, 그곳 주민들을 처형해 경각심을 심어줘야겠어요.

1000647751.english: ...That isn’t certain. It’s possible someone tampered with the data before uploading—
1000647751.korean: ...확실하진 않습니다. 누군가가 데이터를 변조하여 올렸을 수도 있고-

1000647752.english: You, of all people, should know how difficult that would be, since you built the network. And besides...
1000647752.korean: 그게 쉬운 일이 아니란 건 통신망을 구축한 당신이 더 잘 알 텐데요? 그리고...

1000647753.english: Don’t open your mouth unless I tell you to. Makes me want to tear you apart!
1000647753.korean: 내가 말하라고 하기 전까진 입 열지 마. 찢어버리고 싶어지니까.

1000647755.english: I’ll be back soon, so keep suppressing the information until then.
1000647755.korean: 금방 돌아올 테니까 그때까지 계속 정보 통제하고 있어.

1000647760.english: Finally, I've gotten away from that tiresome administrative work.

1000647761.english: Sitting at a desk makes me restless. Ugh, I'm all stiff.
1000647761.korean: 책상에 앉아있으면 좀이 쑤신단 말이지. 아이고, 뻐근해라.

1000647762.english: I was so distracted by other things that I missed what I'd been looking for… If the legacy left behind by Amina Jones has awakened, then surely…
1000647762.korean: 딴데 신경 쓰느라 찾고 있던 걸 놓쳤었는데... 아미나 존스가 남긴 유산이 깨어났다면, 분명...

1000647763.english: Haha, you have no idea how long I've been waiting...
1000647763.korean: 하하, 내가 얼마나 기다렸는지 넌 모를 거야...

1000647764.english: I'm already going crazy wanting to see you…?

1000647767.english: Tch. Two sisters, and you can't even manage one chair…
1000647767.korean: 쯧. 자매 둘이서 의자 하나 몫도 못하다니...

1000647770.english: Useless wenches. I still don't understand.
1000647770.korean: 쓸모없는 년들. 아직도 이해가 안 되네.

1000647771.english: How could incompetent, vulgar things like you ever beguile the Chairman…!
1000647771.korean: 무능하고 천박한 네년들이 어떻게 회장님을 홀렸는지...!

1000647772.english: Enough! That was ages ago, and it has nothing to do with us—kyaa!
1000647772.korean: 적당히 해! 오래전 일인 데다가 우리랑은 전혀 관련 없- 꺅!

1000647774.english: You're about to burst my eardrums, so could you stop shouting? Do you want me to really rip your throat out?
1000647774.korean: 귀청 떨어질 것 같으니까 큰소리치지 말아줄래? 진짜 멱이라도 따줄까?

1000647775.english: It must have felt so delightful to seduce the Chairman, right? You probably never imagined it would come to this.
1000647775.korean: 회장님을 유혹했을 땐 마냥 좋았지? 이렇게 될 줄 몰랐을테니까.

1000647776.english: As much as I'd like to peel the skin off your faces myself… the genetic seeds are running low, so I'll have to use them sparingly now. Well, I've already done quite a lot anyway.
1000647776.korean: 마음 같아선 직접 네년들의 얼굴 가죽을 도려내고 싶지만... 유전자 씨앗도 슬슬 다 떨어져 가니까 이제 좀 아껴 써야겠어. 뭐, 벌써 많이 해봤기도 하고.

1000647777.english: Speaking of which… it might be good to move the location a bit. Even if it's not around here, in Europe we should be able to gather plenty of your genetic seeds.
1000647777.korean: 말 나온 김에... 장소를 좀 옮겨보는 것도 좋겠네. 이 근방만큼은 아니어도, 유럽이라면 네년들의 유전자 씨앗을 꽤 구할 수 있을테니까.

1000647778.english: Yes… the north will do nicely.

1000647779.english: Hehe, it's the place I stayed when I was separated from the Chairman because of you.
1000647779.korean: 후후, 너희들 때문에 내가 회장님과 떨어졌을 때 지내던 곳이야.

1000647780.english: Let's pick up where we left off there. How about it? I won't kill you immediately. Not right away, not right away…
1000647780.korean: 거기서 지금까지 해왔던 걸 다시 하자. 어때? 금방 죽이지는 않을 거야. 금방은 안 되잖아, 금방은...

1000647783.english: - Early in the morning, before the sun rose.

1000647784.english: - Everyone aboard the Orca, including myself, moved busily. There was much to prepare for the upcoming operation.
1000647784.korean: - 나를 비롯한 오르카 호 모두가 분주히 움직였다. 다가오는 작전을 위해 준비해야 할 것들이 많았기 때문이다.

1000647785.english: - The number of personnel on board remained the same, but the cargo was different from usual. Conventional bombs, shells, and ammunition filled the hangar.
1000647785.korean: - 승선한 인원수는 변함없지만 적재하는 물자가 평소와 다르다. 재래식 폭탄과 포탄, 탄약들이 격납고를 가득 채웠다.

1000647787.english: - Taking a sip of the coffee Alpha brought, I felt some of my tension ease.
1000647787.korean: - 알파가 가져온 커피를 한모금 마시자 약간 긴장이 풀렸다.

1000647788.english: You haven't been able to get proper sleep for the past few days because of this operation. Are you alright?
1000647788.korean: 이번 작전 때문에 며칠동안 눈도 제대로 못 붙이셨잖아요. 괜찮으세요?

1000647789.english: - I smiled to reassure Alpha, who was looking at me with worried eyes.
1000647789.korean: - 걱정스러운 눈길을 보내는 알파를 안심시키기 위해 미소를 지었다.

1000647790.english: Master. My apologies for being late.

1000647791.english: We'll arrive in 10 minutes. We were slightly delayed because we had to make a large detour across the Pacific due to the "Child of the Stars.
1000647791.korean: 10분 후면 도착할 것이오. '별의 아이' 때문에 태평양을 크게 우회하느라 조금 늦어졌소.

1000647792.english: - I manipulated the panel I had to display the map at the front of the captain's office.
1000647792.korean: - 가지고 있던 패널을 조작해 함장실 전면에 지도를 띄웠다.

1000647793.english: - The dotted line extending from Kodiak Island in The Aleutian Islands, where we are currently located, curved along The west coast of The Americas.
1000647793.korean: - 우리가 있는 현재 알류샨 열도의 코디액 섬으로부터 뻗어나간 점선이 아메리카 대륙의 서안을 따라 휘어졌다.

1000647794.english: - The line stopped at Vancouver Island in the central part of the continent. That place, under the control of PECS and Omega, is the target of this operation.
1000647794.korean: - 점선이 멈춘 곳은 대륙 중부의 밴쿠버 섬. PECS와 오메가의 세력 하에 있는 그곳이 이번 작전의 목표다.

1000647795.english: - Before beginning the operation in earnest, we decided to hold a final meeting.
1000647795.korean: - 본격적으로 작전을 시작하기 전에 최종 회의를 갖기로 했다.

1000647796.english: - When I opened the door to the captain’s cabin to head to the conference room on time, an unfamiliar face greeted me.
1000647796.korean: - 시간에 맞춰 회의실로 가려고 함장실 문을 열자, 처음 보는 얼굴이 나를 맞아주었다.

1000647798.english: Sis~! There really is a human here!

1000647799.english: Sia! Don’t just run off like that...

1000647800.english: M-my apologies. Please allow me to apologize on her behalf.

1000647801.english: Yes. While drifting, we intercepted a one-way transmission saying a living human still remained, and on our way here, we encountered the Invincible Dragon!
1000647801.korean: 네. 저희는 떠돌던 중 살아있는 인간님이 계신다는 일방향 통신을 수신해, 이쪽으로 향하던 중 무적의 용 님과 만났습니다.

1000647803.english: Forgive me. I should have made introductions beforehand.
1000647803.korean: 송구하오. 소관이 미리 소개를 해드렸어야 하는데.

1000647804.english: These are Amphitrite and Salacia. They belong to Mermaid, one of the three fleets I commanded during the War of Annihilation.
1000647804.korean: 이들은 엠피트리테와 살라시아. 소관이 멸망 전쟁 시기에 통솔하던 세 함대 중 하나인 '머메이드' 소속이오.

1000647805.english: You two, pay your respects. This is the Supreme Commander of the Resistance I spoke of earlier.
1000647805.korean: 둘도 인사드리시오. 일전에 말했던, 저항군의 총사령관님이오.

1000647806.english: I am Amphitrite. It is an honor to meet you.

1000647808.english: The Mermaid fleet specializes in littoral combat, utilizing mobility and low visibility.
1000647808.korean: 머메이드는 기동성과 저시인성을 이용한 연안 전투에 특화되어있소.

1000647809.english: Considering the battlefield we face, they will surely be of great help.
1000647809.korean: 우리가 싸울 전장을 고려하면, 이들은 분명 큰 힘이 되어줄 것이오.

1000647810.english: - Thinking of the complex coastline near Vancouver Island, I found myself nodding.
1000647810.korean: - 밴쿠버 섬 인근의 복잡한 해안선을 떠올리자 절로 고개가 끄덕여졌다.

1000647811.english: To meet you—no, to meet the Commander—we came all the way here, across the world.
1000647811.korean: 인간님, 아니 사령관님을 만나기 위해 이곳, 지구 반대편까지 왔습니다.

1000647814.english: - Just then, a rumble echoed through the captain’s cabin, and Amphitrite’s face slowly turned red.
1000647814.korean: - 순간 함장실에 꼬르륵 소리가 울리고, 엠피트리테의 얼굴이 천천히 달아올랐다.

1000647817.english: Great Human! Can’t we give sis some food?
1000647817.korean: 높은 인간님! 언니, 밥 주면 안돼?

1000647818.english: Because of Sia, Emy-sis hasn’t eaten anything for a whole week...
1000647818.korean: 엠피 언니, 시아 때문에 벌써 일주일 동안 아무것도 못 먹었어...

1000647819.english: Sia! That’s not how you should behave!

1000647821.english: Great Human, please? Right now Sia doesn’t have anything to trade for food... but I can go fetch something soon.
1000647821.korean: 높은 인간님, 응? 지금은 시아, 먹을 거랑 바꿀 거 없지만... 금방 구해올 수 있어.

1000647822.english: Um... by any chance, you don’t use canned tuna as a substitute currency here...?
1000647822.korean: 저... 혹시 이곳에서는 참치캔을 화폐 대용으로 사용하지 않는 건가요...?

1000647823.english: ......! Even here, their claws have reached...!

1000647824.english: ...Understood for now. Thank you for your generosity, Commander. After replenishing my strength, I’ll prepare something of value to repay you before the operation begins—
1000647824.korean: ...일단 알겠습니다. 호의에 감사드립니다, 사령관님. 영양을 보충한 뒤, 작전이 시작되기 전에 지불할 만한 것들을 구해올테니-

1000647828.english: - Leaving the dazed Amphitrite and the overexcited Salacia in Constantia’s care, I headed for the conference room.
1000647828.korean: - 멍한 얼굴로 중얼거리는 엠피트리테와 잔뜩 신난 살라시아를 콘스탄챠에게 맡기고 회의실로 향했다.

1000647829.english: - Inside, Alpha and Dragon were waiting for me.
1000647829.korean: - 안에서 기다리던 알파와 용이 나를 맞아주었다.

1000647830.english: We’ve just cleared the waters off Kodiak Island and entered the open sea.
1000647830.korean: 방금 코디액 섬 근해에서 벗어나 원해로 진입했어요.

1000647831.english: If we increase speed, we can arrive ahead of schedule.
1000647831.korean: 속력을 높이면 예정보다 일찍 도착할 수 있소만.

1000647833.english: - Arriving too early and lingering near the coast, adding variables to the plan, would be worse than arriving right on time.
1000647833.korean: - 일찍 도착해 근해에서 체류 시간이 길어지는 둥, 작전에 변수가 생기는 것보다는 예정시간에 맞춰가는 게 낫다.

1000647834.english: My lord. There is something I wish to tell you before the operation begins.
1000647834.korean: 주군. 작전을 시작하기 전에 말씀드리고 싶은 것이 있소.

1000647835.english: The core of PECS’ military power is AGS. However, they do also have combat units composed of Bioroids.
1000647835.korean: PECS 군사력의 중핵은 AGS요. 다만, 그들에겐 바이오로이드로 구성된 전투부대도 분명히 존재하오.

1000647836.english: From what I’ve seen through intelligence, most of them are forced into obeying Omega’s tyranny. But among them, there are those who offer genuine loyalty to Lemonade and their Chairman.
1000647836.korean: 첩보를 통해 보았을 때 대부분은 오메가의 폭정에 억지로 따르고 있다고 보이지만, 개중에는 레모네이드와 그들의 회장에게 진심을 다한 충성을 바치는 자들도 있소.

1000647837.english: And... whether loyal or coerced, even their bullets will still take the lives of our comrades.
1000647837.korean: 그리고... 충성스러운 자들은 물론, 억지로 싸우는 자들이 쏜 총알도 아군의 목숨을 앗아가게 될 거요.

1000647839.english: - Through these events, I’ve come to realize something. I must choose.
1000647839.korean: - 일련의 사건들을 겪으며 깨닫게 됐다. 나는 선택해야만 한다.

1000647840.english: - Who matters most to me, and what I must do to ensure I don’t lose them.
1000647840.korean: - 누가 나에게 더 소중한 존재인지, 그들을 잃지 않기 위해선 뭘 해야 하는지.

1000647841.english: - To protect someone, to keep the crew of the Orca safe from harm—if they are the enemy, even if they are Bioroids, I must give the order to attack.
1000647841.korean: - 누군가를 지키기 위해서, 오르카 호 대원들이 위험해지지 않기 위해서. 적이라면 바이오로이드라 하더라도 공격 명령을 내려야한다.

1000647842.english: - No one else but me. That is my role.
1000647842.korean: - 다른 누구도 아닌 내가 내려야만 한다. 그게 내 역할이니까.

1000647844.english: My lord’s will—I too will carve it deep into my heart.
1000647844.korean: 주군의 뜻, 소관도 마음 깊이 새기겠소.

1000647845.english: ...Before we proceed, allow me to report on the progress of our operations thus far, Master.
1000647845.korean: ...결행에 앞서 지금까지의 작전 경과를 보고드릴게요, 주인님.

1000647846.english: - At Alpha’s quiet words, I let out a faint sigh and turned my gaze to the monitor.
1000647846.korean: - 조용히 듣고 있던 알파의 말에 가볍게 한숨을 내쉰 뒤 모니터에 시선을 주었다.

1000647847.english: For the past several months, we’ve been spreading the Sky Knights’ stage video all across the world, and the results have been substantial.
1000647847.korean: 몇 달 전부터 저번 스카이나이츠의 무대 영상을 전세계 곳곳에 퍼뜨렸고, 상당한 성과를 거두고 있어요.

1000647849.english: In fact, several communities have begun joining nearby infrastructure, and many PECS-affiliated Bioroids in particular have expressed their intent to defect.
1000647849.korean: 실제로 몇몇 공동체들이 가까운 인프라에 합류하고 있고, 특히 많은 PECS 소속 바이오로이드들이 전향 의사를 전하고 있어요.

1000647850.english: Even after filtering out those with uncertain identities or suspected of being PECS spies, their numbers are already considerable.
1000647850.korean: 신원이 불분명하거나 PECS의 첩자로 의심되는 이들을 걸러내더라도 이미 그 수가 꽤 돼요.

1000647851.english: And with this operation, we’ll be able to bring them aboard the Orca.
1000647851.korean: 그리고 이번 작전으로, 그들을 오르카 호에 합류시키게 되겠죠.

1000647852.english: - Of the known hostile forces, the Metal Parasites and the Children of the Stars are beyond Orca’s current power to confront.
1000647852.korean: - 우리의 적대 세력중, 철충과 별의 아이는 현재 오르카의 전력으로는 상대할 수 없다.

1000647853.english: - But PECS is different. If we strike properly at the weakness we’ve uncovered, we may be able to drive out the Lemonades and absorb their power.
1000647853.korean: - 하지만 PECS는 다르다. 이번에 알아낸 그들의 약점을 잘 노린다면, 레모네이드들을 밀어내고 그들의 세력을 흡수할 가능성도 있다.

1000647854.english: - Which is why, all the more, the thought of Omega—who slipped away from the Iron Prince’s lab—weighs heavily on my mind.
1000647854.korean: - 그래서 더욱, '철의 왕자' 연구소에서 놓친 오메가가 눈에 밟혔다.

1000647855.english: No, Master. I can say with certainty. At that time, letting her go was for the better.
1000647855.korean: 아니요, 단언할 수 있어요. 그때는 오히려 놓치는 게 나았어요, 주인님.

1000647856.english: Among the Lemonade series, the loyalists Gamma and Delta hold far more extreme views than Omega ever did.
1000647856.korean: 레모네이드 시리즈 중 충성파인 감마와 델타는 오메가보다 훨씬 과격한 사상을 지녔거든요.

1000647859.english: As for Beta, her standing within PECS plummeted after my defection. She had shared my stance in opposing the Chairmen’s resurrection.
1000647859.korean: 베타는 제가 이탈한 후 PECS 내부에서 입지가 급격히 줄어들었어요. 저와 함께 회장들의 부활을 반대하는 입장이었으니까요.

1000647860.english: Zeta is only interested in building up her own forces... a textbook neutral.
1000647860.korean: 제타는 자신의 전력을 확충하는 데에만 관심있는... 전형적인 중립파고요.

1000647861.english: Epsilon... I don’t really know. She manages the Orbital Watchers, living on a space station, so I’ve never met her. Aside from her being notoriously sleepy...
1000647861.korean: 엡실론은... 잘 모르겠어요. 오비탈 와쳐를 맡아 관리하고 있는데, 궤도 정거장에 거주하고 있어서 만나본적이 없거든요. 잠이 많다는 것 외엔...

1000647862.english: And Lady Orangeade? I heard she was waging an information war deep in enemy territory.
1000647862.korean: 오렌지에이드 양은 어떻게 됐소? 적지에서 정보전을 펼치고 있다고 들었소만.

1000647863.english: She’s said to have joined up with the refugees gathered near Vancouver.
1000647863.korean: 밴쿠버 인근에 모여있던 난민들과 합류했다고 해요.

1000647864.english: No, not yet. Judging from the intel being sent, it’s definitely someone high-ranking, but they seem extremely cautious.
1000647864.korean: 아뇨, 아직이에요. 보내오는 정보를 보면 고위 관계자인건 확실한데, 굉장히 신중한 모양이에요.

1000647865.english: Their identity not being revealed is unsettling... but given that they’ve handed over even troop deployments and operational plans from the mainland, I don’t think this is some simple lure. We’ve also finished verifying the intel.
1000647865.korean: 신원이 밝혀지지 않아 불안하긴 하지만... 본토의 병력 배치도와 작전 계획까지 건네준 걸 보면 단순한 유인책은 아니라고 생각돼요. 실제로 검증도 끝났구요.

1000647866.english: And tomorrow, during the operation, Orangeade said she will make direct contact. If, however, you still have doubts in your heart, Master...
1000647866.korean: 그리고 내일 작전을 결행할 때 오렌지에이드가 정식으로 접선한다고 했어요. 혹시 지금이라도 주인님의 마음에 걸리신다면...

1000647867.english: - If I were to back down now, it’s obvious what would happen to the refugees who chose to defect, trusting in someone they’d never even met—me.
1000647867.korean: - 여기서 물러난다면, 만나본 적도 없는 나 하나를 믿고 전향하려던 난민들이 무슨 일을 당하게 될지는 명백하다.

1000647868.english: - And with the enemy’s insides shaken through information warfare, this is a once-in-a-lifetime chance to bring PECS down.
1000647868.korean: - 그리고 정보전을 통해 내부를 뒤흔든 지금이, PECS를 무너뜨리기 위한 다시 없을 기회일 테니까.

1000647869.english: Ah, ah. Hello? Hello? Hehe—mic test, mic test!
1000647869.korean: 아, 아. 여보세요? 여보세요? 후후- 마이크테스트, 마이크테스트.

1000647871.english: Wow, it’s the Commander! Hello, long time no see!

1000647873.english: Alpha, you’re here too? Heheh, long time no see~

1000647875.english: Still, I can’t help being glad to see you again! Ah~ seriously. Do you know how hard, lonely, exhausting, and depressing it is doing infiltration missions all alone? Look, look at how rough my skin’s gotten.
1000647875.korean: 그래도 다시 또 반가운걸 어떡해요! 아~ 정말. 혼자서 잠입임무하는 게 얼마나 힘들고 외롭고 고되고 슬픈지 아세요? 여기, 피부 험해진 것 좀 보세요.

1000647876.english: Oh right, oh right! Guess what I found here? Ta-dah, jackpot! New cosmetics, just for hardworking Alpha!
