1000647876.korean: 맞다, 맞다! 제가 여기서 뭘 찾았게요? 짠, 대박! 고생하시는 알파님을 위해 구한 신상 화장품!

1000647877.english: Well? Didn’t I do great? You missed me a lot, right? Eheheh!
1000647877.korean: 어때요, 저 잘했죠? 저 많이 보고 싶으시죠? 에헤헷!

1000647879.english: That’s right, Commander! That person seems extremely cautious.
1000647879.korean: 맞아요, 사령관님! 그 분, 굉장히 조심성이 많으신 것 같아요.

1000647880.english: At first, just getting in contact took me weeks~
1000647880.korean: 처음에는 연락하는 데만 몇 주가 걸렸는지~

1000647881.english: Ah, and not long ago, I spotted a cargo truck with Zeta’s mark passing near Vancouver Airport.
1000647881.korean: 아, 얼마 전에 제타의 표식이 그려진 화물차가 밴쿠버 공항 인근을 지나갔어요.

1000647882.english: I figured out the cargo was construction materials, but where they were moved or what they’re building is unclear. Well, it’s not like they’re setting up a toy factory, so I’m guessing a new munitions plant.
1000647882.korean: 화물이 건설 자재인 건 알아냈는데, 어디로 옮겨서 뭘 하려고 하는지는 불명확하구요. 뭐, 장난감 공장을 세울리는 없으니까 새로운 군수 공장을 짓는 거라고 봐요.

1000647884.english: With Zeta’s abilities, a munitions factory could already be built and test-running by now.
1000647884.korean: 제타의 능력이라면 군수 공장 하나쯤은 다 짓고 시험가동까지 마쳤을 시간이죠.

1000647885.english: Ehehet, yep! Once this mission is over, I’ll be reassigned to desk duty aboard the Orca~!
1000647885.korean: 에헤헷, 네! 이번 임무만 끝나면 오르카 호에서 내근이니까요~!

1000647886.english: Alright then, I’ll check in again soon!

1000647887.english: - The strategic objective of this operation was the evacuation of refugees using transport planes.
1000647887.korean: - 이번 작전의 전략 목표는 수송기를 통한 난민들의 호송이다.

1000647888.english: - To do that, a bridgehead had to be secured and safe passage established. Overwhelming firepower was needed to drive out the PECS forces garrisoned in the city.
1000647888.korean: - 그러기 위해선 교두보를 마련하고, 난민들의 이동로를 확보해야 한다. 도시에 주둔 중인 PECS 세력을 압도할 화력이 필요했다.

1000647889.english: - Therefore, the unit in charge of securing the bridgehead this time, as well as starting and finishing the operation, will be–
1000647889.korean: - 따라서 이번 교두보 확보를 비롯해, 작전의 시작과 끝을 담당할 부대는-

1000647891.english: We got word from the Commander that the western communications network has been taken. Once our unit and the naval fleet finish the bombardment, the ground forces will secure the area.
1000647891.korean: 사령관한테서 서부 통신망을 장악했다는 정보가 들어왔어. 우리 부대랑 해상 함대가 포격을 마치면 지상 병력이 지역을 확보할 거야.

1000647892.english: Our role in today’s operation is critical. Everyone’s clear on that, right?
1000647892.korean: 오늘 있을 작전에서 우리의 역할이 막중해. 다들 숙지했지?

1000647896.english: Stick close to me like always. You brought the chaff, right?
1000647896.korean: 평소처럼 내 옆에 딱 붙어 있어. 채프 챙겨놨지?

1000647897.english: Hehe, leave it to me. I packed a ton!

1000647900.english: Yes, Captain. Did you call me?

1000647901.english: Same mission as Djinnia. But instead of protecting me, focus on intercepting enemy aerial forces.
1000647901.korean: 지니야랑 같은 임무야. 하지만 날 보호하는 것보다 적 공중병력의 요격에 집중해줘.

1000647904.english: Daika, you’ll act as the control tower — compile my orders and each member’s situation, and share them with the squad. Banshee, you’re on precision strikes.
1000647904.korean: 다이카는 내가 내리는 지휘와 각 대원이 처한 상황을 종합, 부대원들에게 공유하는 관제탑 역할이야. 밴시는 정밀 타격.

1000647906.english: Understood. Which facilities should we prioritize for strikes?
1000647906.korean: 숙지하겠습니다. 어떤 시설을 우선해서 타격하면 되겠습니까?

1000647907.english: Focus on facilities untouched by the strategic bombing team’s strikes.
1000647907.korean: 전략폭격팀의 폭격이 닿지 않은 시설을 중점으로 폭격해.

1000647908.english: Night Angel and Strato Angel, you’ll be moving with me in this operation. We’ll crush the coastal forces in one blow.
1000647908.korean: 나이트앤젤과 스트라토엔젤은 이번 작전에선 나랑 같이 움직여. 해안선의 병력을 단번에 분쇄할 거야.

1000647909.english: Wraithy, who isn’t here, is already guiding in the operation zone. Any questions?
1000647909.korean: 자리에 없는 레이스는 이미 작전 지역에서 유도 중이고, 궁금한 점은?

1000647910.english: None. Maybe because it’s just the preliminary battle, it seems relatively simple. Of course, it also helps that the excellent me understood it all at once.
1000647910.korean: 없어요, 전초전이라 그런지 비교적 간단하네요. 우수한 제가 단번에 알아들은 덕도 있지만요.

1000647911.english: We just need to overwhelm the enemy with superior firepower, right?
1000647911.korean: 압도적인 화력으로 상대방을 제압하면 되는 거죠?

1000647912.english: There is one concern. You haven’t organized a reserve force.
1000647912.korean: 한 가지 우려되는 부분이 있습니다. 예비대를 구성하지 않으셨는데요.

1000647913.english: Is it correct that all of Doom Bringer’s forces are being deployed?
1000647913.korean: 둠 브링어의 전 병력이 출격하는 게 맞습니까?

1000647914.english: Ah...! R-right. I didn’t set aside a reserve force.
1000647914.korean: 앗...! 그, 그렇죠. 예비대를 구성하지 않았었죠.

1000647915.english: Hehe, I was going to ask that too. Night Angel, so you had the same thought as me?
1000647915.korean: 후후, 저도 물어보려고 했었어요. 나이트 앤젤, 저랑 똑같은 생각을 했군요?

1000647918.english: That’s for when the main operation starts. There’s a lot to consider, so I’m still deciding.
1000647918.korean: 그건 본 작전에 들어서서. 고려할게 많아서 아직 고민중이야.

1000647922.english: Target area confirmed silent. The ground forces should be able to land as planned.
1000647922.korean: 목표 지역 침묵 확인. 예정대로 지상병력 상륙하면 될 것 같아.

1000647926.english: - May, who used to blush just by meeting my eyes, was looking at me seriously.
1000647926.korean: - 눈만 마주쳐도 얼굴을 붉히던 메이가 나를 진지하게 바라봤다.

1000647927.english: - It seemed important, so I didn’t cut the comms and waited. At that moment, the Armored Maiden crew passed by behind her.
1000647927.korean: - 중요한 이야기인 것 같아 통신을 끊지 않고 기다렸다. 그때, 메이의 등 뒤로 아머드 메이든의 대원들이 지나갔다.

1000647929.english: Alright. But just remember one thing.

1000647930.english: Doom is on the Commander’s side.

1000647935.english: Before sortie... I should’ve held back on food... cough!
1000647935.korean: 출격 전에... 먹을 건, 자제... 콜록!

1000647941.english: Thank youuu... gulp gulp gulp gulp-?!

1000647943.english: Djinnia, what are you doing, so uncool!

1000647944.english: Ah~ seriously! I didn’t even get a sip...
1000647944.korean: 아~ 정말! 난 한모금도 못 마셨단 말이야...

1000647945.english: S-sorry, Sylphid. It just went down the wrong way...

1000647946.english: Wraithy, really thank—huh?! Where did she go?
1000647946.korean: 레이스님, 정말 고마- 엇?! 어디 가셨지?

1000647947.english: Looks like she already moved on to the next operation zone.

1000647948.english: She may be quiet, but... she’s always so reliable.

1000647949.english: Anyway, Djinnia. Did you... properly protect the Captain?
1000647949.korean: 그건 그렇고, 지니야. 너는... 대장님을 제대로 지켰어?

1000647950.english: I was struggling just to keep up... I was all over the place.

1000647951.english: Captain, is something going on? You seem to be in a hurry today.
1000647951.korean: 대장님, 무슨 일 있으신가? 오늘따라 서두르시는 것 같아.

1000647952.english: ..Tch, such humiliation! As an escort, I should’ve protected the Captain perfectly...!

1000647957.english: If we want to get faster, we’ve got to at least drop some weight!

1000647958.english: Just watch, I’ll coolly protect everyone.
1000647958.korean: 두고 봐, 쿨하게 모두를 지켜낼 거야.

1000647959.english: Sounds tough, but if it’s for everyone... alright, Sylphid. I’ll starve too.
1000647959.korean: 힘들 것 같지만 모두를 위해서라면... 알았어, 실피드. 나도 굶을게.

1000647960.english: Just let me finish this corn first!

1000647962.english: A-as expected of the Captain. Such incredible operational ability. But I, Strato Angel, am no less...
1000647962.korean: 여, 역시 대장님. 엄청난 작전수행 능력이시군요. 하지만 저 스트라토 엔젤도 뒤지지 않는...

1000647965.english: Banshee...? O-of course! I... cough! I’m f-fine...!
1000647965.korean: 밴시...? 무, 물론이죠! 저는, 콜록...! 괜찮, 아요...!

1000647966.english: Surely Banshee is unfazed too, right?

1000647967.english: To be honest, I’m very exhausted.

1000647968.english: To fly alongside the Captain, I had to sprint at full power.
1000647968.korean: 대장님과 나란히 비행하기 위해선 전력으로 질주해야 했으니까요.

1000647969.english: The others... also look very worn out...

1000647970.english: Indeed, the Captain seemed different today... didn’t she?

1000647972.english: I was shocked when the commander collapsed from overwork, but this summer, his life was actually in danger.
1000647972.korean: 사령관님이 과로로 쓰러졌을 때도 충격받았었는데, 이번 여름엔 목숨까지 위험하셨으니까요.

1000647974.english: Since then, he seems to have completely changed. As soon as this operation was proposed, he’s been sacrificing even his dawn hours to devise strategies.
1000647974.korean: 그 뒤로 확 변한 것 같습니다. 이번 작전이 발안된 것과 동시에 새벽에도 잠을 아껴가며 전략을 구상하더군요.

1000647975.english: That’s right... even before I could relay the intel I gathered from high-altitude reconnaissance...
1000647975.korean: 맞아요... 제가 고도 정찰로 얻어낸 정보를 전파하기도 전에...

1000647976.english: She was already moving as if she knew exactly where the enemy was deployed...
1000647976.korean: 상대가 어디에 배치됐는지 다 알고 있는 것처럼 움직이시더라구요...

1000647977.english: So... that’s why the squad had trouble keeping up... those who moved based on my intel...
1000647977.korean: 그래서... 부대원들이 따라가기도 벅찼던 거예요... 제 정보를 듣고 움직이는 분들은...

1000647978.english: Still had to chase after the Captain, who was already en route to the next location...
1000647978.korean: 미리 다음 장소로 이동하는 대장님을... 쫓아가야 했으니까요...

1000647979.english: ...I understand the sentiment, but that’s a dangerous way to act.

1000647980.english: If we secure the foothold quickly... the operation gains extra time to maneuver...
1000647980.korean: 교두보를 속히 확보하면... 작전의 여유시간이 늘어나니까요...

1000647981.english: That must be why, don’t you think...

1000647982.english: Haa... anyway, I’ll just have to keep working hard to keep up.

1000647983.english: That’s the role of a second-in-command, after all.

1000647984.english: - With the bombardment from Doom Bringer under May’s command and the detached fleet under the Invincible Dragon, we were able to secure an operations base on Vancouver Island.
1000647984.korean: - 메이가 이끄는 둠 브링어와 무적의 용이 이끄는 분함대의 포격을 바탕으로 밴쿠버 섬에 작전기지를 확보할 수 있었다.

1000647985.english: - From here on, the operation is on a countdown. It must be decided in the shortest time possible and put into action.
1000647985.korean: - 앞으로의 작전은 초읽기. 최단시간 내에 결정하고, 실행에 옮겨야 한다.

1000647988.english: - Lilith gave me a slight smile and headed for her security post.
1000647988.korean: - 리리스는 내게 살짝 웃어보이곤 경호 위치로 향했다.

1000647990.english: I heard that she is working with an inside contact to disrupt PECS’s western regional intelligence network. She said she must devote her full attention to this matter, so please forgive her for the discourtesy of not attending the strategy meeting.
1000647990.korean: 내부 협력자와 함께 PECS의 서부지역 정보 네트워크를 교란하고 있다고 들었소. 심혈을 기울여야 하니, 대책회의에 참석하지 못하는 결례를 용서해달라더군.

1000647991.english: Tch… I hear the other commanders also have no time to attend, as they’re changing their formations and rechecking equipment to deal with contingencies.
1000647991.korean: 이런... 다른 지휘관들도 돌발상황에 대처하기 위해 진영을 변경하고 장비를 재점검하느라 참석할 겨를이 없다는군.

1000647992.english: - This refugee escort mission had to be carried out swiftly, yet there was still so much to be done.
1000647992.korean: - 이번 난민 호송 작전은 신속하게 이루어져야하는 반면, 해야 할 일이 많았다.

1000647993.english: - On the large screen set up in the temporary command tent, I brought up the operations map showing Vancouver Island, Vancouver City, and Seattle, where one of PECS’s naval ports was located.
1000647993.korean: - 임시지휘소 천막에 설치된 대형스크린으로 밴쿠버 섬과 밴쿠버 도시, PECS의 군항이 있는 시애틀이 담긴 작전지도를 띄웠다.

1000647994.english: - The first step had been securing a foothold at Port Renfrew.
1000647994.korean: - 일단은 포트 른프루에 교두보를 확보한 게 첫단추.

1000647995.english: - To prevent the Orca’s command transmissions from being picked up by PECS surveillance, a temporary command post was set up on land. That much was complete.
1000647995.korean: - 오르카 호의 지휘 통신이 PECS의 감시망에 발각되는 것을 피하기 위해 지상에 임시 지휘소를 설치. 지금 여기까지 완료된 상태다.

1000647996.english: - Next, transport aircraft carrying Doom Bringer and Armored Maiden would head for Vancouver International Airport…
1000647996.korean: - 이어서 나나이모를  둠 브링어, 아머드 메이든을 태운 수송기가 밴쿠버 국제 공항으로 향하게 되고...

1000647997.english: - The plan was to secure takeoff and landing zones for the refugee transports and bombard the PECS garrison stationed in Vancouver.
1000647997.korean: - 난민을 호송할 수송기의 이착륙장 확보 및 밴쿠버 주둔군에게 폭격을 가할 계획이었다.

1000647998.english: - At the same time, Anger of Horde would deploy south of Vancouver Airport, toward Blaine.
1000647998.korean: - 동시에 앵거 오브 호드는 밴쿠버 공항 남쪽, 블레인 방면으로 전개.

1000647999.english: - This would tie down PECS’s western rapid-response reinforcements.
1000647999.korean: - 증원이 예상되는 PECS 서부 신속 대응군의 발을 묶게된다.

1000648000.english: - Meanwhile, the detached fleet led by Dragon, together with Horizon and the newly joined Mermaid combatants, would form a defensive line across the islets south of Vancouver Airport.
1000648000.korean: - 그리고 용이 이끄는 분함대와 호라이즌, 이번에 합류한 머메이드 전투원들은 밴쿠버 공항 남쪽의 군도에서 방어선을 형성.

1000648001.english: - Their task was to stop the Poseidon Fleet, expected to sail north from Seattle, one of PECS’s naval ports.
1000648001.korean: - PECS의 군항중 하나인 시애틀에서 출항해 북상할 포세이돈 함대를 막아낸다.

1000648002.english: - With a small force, we would form fronts only where necessary, and swiftly achieve the refugee transport.
1000648002.korean: - 소수의 인원으로 필요한 곳에만 전선을 형성하고, 난민 수송을 신속하게 달성하는 것.

1000648003.english: - That was the strategic objective of this operation…

1000648004.english: hat’s right. First, some good news.

1000648005.english: During the previous reconnaissance, there had been a regiment-sized force of Bioroids stationed on Vancouver Island, but according to recent intel, they all moved inland two days ago.
1000648005.korean: 이전 정찰 때는 밴쿠버 섬에 연대 규모의 바이오로이드 병력이 주둔 중이었소만, 최근 정보에 의하면 이틀 전 모두 내륙으로 이동했다더군.

1000648006.english: And not just here—similar reports came in from every coastal outpost.
1000648006.korean: 비단 이곳뿐만이 아니라 모든 해안 거점에서 똑같은 정황이 보고되었소.

1000648007.english: Unfortunately, that much we don’t know. For that, we’ll need to ask Miss Orangeade and the inside collaborator working with Miss Alpha.
1000648007.korean: 아쉽게도 거기까지는 파악이 되지 않소. 그 점에 관해선 오렌지에이드 양, 그리고 알파 양에게 협조하고 있는 내부 협력자와 이야기해봐야 알 것 같소.

1000648009.english: That’s why this strategy meeting was called.

1000648010.english: How troublesome. Of all times, it had to be now…
1000648010.korean: 골치 아프군. 하필 지금 이 시점에...

1000648011.english: - Just now, I brought up on screen a set of photographs of the fleet that docked at Seattle Naval Port.
1000648011.korean: - 방금 전, 시애틀 군항에 입항한 함대의 사진 자료를 화면에 띄웠다.

1000648013.english: The ultimate and strongest warship, a vessel born of the warmongering tendencies of Poseidon Industry’s chairman.
1000648013.korean: 포세이돈 인더스트리 회장의 전쟁광 기질을 함선으로 빚어낸 최대최강의 군함.

1000648014.english: Built by PECS during the War of Annihilation to seize control of the seas, where the Metal Parasites were relatively weaker.
1000648014.korean: 멸망 전쟁 때, 상대적으로 철충의 약세였던 해상을 장악하기 위해서 PECS에서 건조한 전함입니다.

1000648015.english: Outfitted with a room-temperature fusion reactor, it has no operational time limits, and its armor plating is covered in a special alloy more expensive than gold by weight.
1000648015.korean: 상온 핵융합로를 탑재해 작전 시간에 제약이 없으며, 같은 무게의 금보다 비싼 특수합금으로 장갑판을 둘렀죠.

1000648016.english: To counter maneuver-type Metal Parasites, its deck is bristling with anti-air cannons and CIWS, on top of devastating naval guns.
1000648016.korean: 그리고 기동형 철충에 대한 대응능력을 갖추기 위해 대공포와 CIWS가 갑판에 빼곡하게 설치된 건 물론, 괴멸적인 화력을 가진 함포까지.

1000648017.english: A single warship with the combat capability of an entire fleet—its flagship.

1000648018.english: As for its master, Gamma, there is someone here who knows better than I.
1000648018.korean: 저것의 주인인 감마에 관해선 저보다 더 잘 알고 있는 사람이 있습니다.

1000648019.english: - At Marie’s words, Lilith and I turned to look at the Invincible Dragon.
1000648019.korean: - 마리의 말이 끝나고, 리리스와 나는 무적의 용을 바라봤다.

1000648020.english: - Back in the Second Coalition War, when PECS and Black River were allied, it had been Dragon who served as Supreme Commander.
1000648020.korean: - 2차 연합 전쟁에서 PECS와 블랙 리버가 동맹일 당시, 총사령관을 용이 맡았기 때문이다.

1000648022.english: When we first met, I didn't realize you were Lemonade Gamma.
1000648022.korean: 처음 만났을 땐, 레모네이드 감마인 줄 몰랐소.

1000648023.english: At Allied Headquarters, the chairman of Poseidon Industry had shown up with a Bioroid. He introduced her as Gamma, the one who would serve as deputy commander.
1000648023.korean: 연합군사령부에서 포세이돈 인더스트리의 회장이 한 바이오로이드를 데리고 나타났었소. 부사령관을 맡을 감마라고 소개했었지.

1000648025.english: I knew you'd be here. I could smell gunpowder from dozens of kilometers away.
1000648025.korean: 역시 여기 있을 것 같더라니까. 수십 킬로미터 밖에서도 화약 냄새가 나더라고.

1000648026.english: What’s this? A terrain map of the area? Hm… I see. I know what you’re plotting.
1000648026.korean: 뭐야, 저거? 여기 지형도잖아. 흠... 그렇군. 뭘 꾸미는지 알겠어.

1000648027.english: Looks like you’re moving someone out through the airport… no, not just someone, is it? The scale is too large. It’s a mass transport operation, isn’t it? Ah… refugees trying to escape from PECS.
1000648027.korean: 공항에서 누군가를 실어나를 모양이구만... 아니, 누군가가 아닌가? 작전규모가 큰데. 대규모 수송 작전이지? 그래... PECS를 빠져나가려는 난민들이군.

1000648028.english: But those photos of the naval port with the Annihilator—don’t tell me you were talking about me? Haha! Perfect timing, I’ve arrived right on cue!
1000648028.korean: 그런데 저 군항 사진에 어나이얼레이터, 설마 내 얘기 중이었나? 하하! 내가 시간에 딱 맞춰서 왔군!

1000648029.english: - Someone entered the command tent where no further arrivals were expected. At the same time, alarms blared in every direction.
1000648029.korean: - 더 이상 올 사람이 없는 지휘 천막에 누군가가 들어왔다. 동시에 사방에서 경보음이 울려퍼졌다.

1000648032.english: Long time no see, Dragon. I heard you’d awakened. I thought I’d go mad from wanting to see you.
1000648032.korean: 오랜만이야, 용. 깨어났다는 소식을 들었어. 보고 싶어서 미치는 줄 알았다고.

1000648033.english: Of course you felt the same, didn’t you? Haha!

1000648036.english: - The field command post, where the Orca’s core forces were gathered. Gamma, who had stormed in alone, didn’t even glance my way; her gaze was fixed on the dragon.
1000648036.korean: - 오르카 호의 핵심전력이 모여있는 야전 지휘소. 그곳에 단신으로 쳐들어온 감마는 내쪽에는 눈길도 주지 않고 용에게 시선을 고정한 채였다.

1000648037.english: If you wanted to see the Commander that badly, you could’ve just joined Amina Jones.
1000648037.korean: 그렇게 본관이 보고 싶었다면 같이 아미나 존스에게 합류했으면 됐잖소?

1000648038.english: It was the Chairman’s order. We couldn’t afford to lose any power until he woke up from hibernation.
1000648038.korean: 회장님의 명령이 있었으니까. 동면에서 깨어나실 때까지 전력을 손실시켜선 안 됐었거든.

1000648039.english: Back then, with traitors in the ranks and too few ships, I couldn’t fight with full force—
1000648039.korean: 그때는 배신자도 있고, 함선도 적어서 전력으로 붙지 못했지만-

1000648040.english: But now, I’ve got every reason I need. So, Dragon—
1000648040.korean: 지금은 마땅한 대의명분도 있으니까. 어때, 용?

1000648041.english: What do you say we go at it, head-to-head?!

1000648043.english: Coming here unarmed means you’ve got something up your sleeve. Tell us what it is.
1000648043.korean: 비무장 상태로 여기까지 왔다는 건 믿는 구석이 있단 소리겠지. 무엇인지 밝히시오.

1000648044.english: As sharp as ever, Dragon. Quick to size up the situation.

1000648045.english: I’ll be blunt. The other Lemonades still don’t know this place is under attack.
1000648045.korean: 단도직입적으로 말하지. 다른 레모네이드 녀석들은 아직 이곳이 공격당하는 줄 몰라.

1000648046.english: And I’m not going to tell them. You know why, don’t you?
1000648046.korean: 그리고 나는 녀석들에게 알리지 않을 거야. 이유는... 알지?

1000648047.english: …You mean, just so you can fight the Commander?

1000648049.english: The strongest—me—and the Invincible—you. We clash. The loser dies, the winner becomes ruler of the seas!
1000648049.korean: 최강인 나와 무적인 네가 맞붙는다. 진 쪽은 목숨을 잃고, 이긴 쪽은 바다의 패자가 된다.

1000648050.english: Well? Isn’t it glorious? Hah! Just the thought of it thrills me to no end!
1000648050.korean: 어때, 멋지지 않아? 하핫, 생각만 해도 즐거워서 견딜 수가 없는걸!

1000648051.english: Answer the question, Gamma. What’s your trump card?
1000648051.korean: 묻는 말에 대답하시오, 감마. 그대가 믿는 구석이 무엇인지.

1000648053.english: Ever since Alpha betrayed us, the rest of us have been keeping in regular contact.
1000648053.korean: 알파가 배신한 뒤로, 우리들끼리는 정기적으로 연락을 주고받고 있어.

1000648054.english: And the next check-in is coming up soon… If you capture me or kill me now, Omega will know instantly. Then… not just the Western Rapid Response Force you’re worried about, but every last PECS soldier will come tearing here like mad.
1000648054.korean: 곧 정기연락 시간인데... 지금 날 붙잡거나 죽이면, 오메가 녀석이 바로 알게 되겠지. 그러면... 너희가 지금 신경쓰고 있는 서부 신속 대응군 뿐만 아니라, PECS의 전 병력이 이곳으로 미친듯이 달려올거야.

1000648055.english: Oh, don’t know our troop deployments? I could tell you, if you like.
1000648055.korean: 아, 우리 군의 배치는 알고 있나? 모르면 알려줄 수도 있다고?

1000648056.english: Hmph. We could just capture you and force you to give false reports. Torture you, if we must.
1000648056.korean: 흥. 널 붙잡아서 거짓으로 보고하게 하면 되겠지. 고문을 해서라도.

1000648057.english: Really… you’d actually try that? That’s no fun at all.
1000648057.korean: 이런... 정말 그럴 생각이야? 재미 없잖아, 그런건.

1000648058.english: Whether it’s fun or not—you’ll only know once you’ve experienced it.

1000648059.english: - It didn’t feel like a bluff. Gamma was someone who would never break under torture.
1000648059.korean: - 허풍이 아니라는 게 느껴졌다. 감마는, 절대로 고문에 굴복할 인물이 아니다.

1000648060.english: - As if to prove my thoughts right, even Dragon, who knew Gamma well, made no move to seize her.
1000648060.korean: - 나의 생각이 옳다는 걸 증명하듯, 감마와 구면인 용도 그녀를 포획하려 들지 않았다.

1000648062.english: Will you fight only me and my fleet, or will you take on Omega—furious beyond measure—and the full might of PECS?
1000648062.korean: 나와 내 함대랑만 싸울지, 아니면 단단히 빡돈 오메가를 위시한 PECS의 전력을 상대할지.

1000648063.english: I trust you’ll make the wise choice, Dragon.
1000648063.korean: 너라면 현명한 판단을 내릴 거라 믿고 있어, 용.

1000648065.english: Think it over. It’s not all that different from the plan you already had.
1000648065.korean: 잘 생각해봐. 어차피 원래 너희 계획과 별로 다를 것도 없다고.

1000648066.english: Except for the part where I’m involved.

1000648068.english: Take your time. I’ve got plenty.

1000648069.english: You’re the ones short on time, aren’t you? This is a surprise operation. From the moment you occupied this place, the clock’s been ticking. Tick-tock.
1000648069.korean: 시간이 부족한 건 너희들이지. 안 그래? 이거 기습작전이잖아. 여길 점거했을 때부터 시계바늘이 돌아가고 있을 텐데? 째깍째깍.

1000648071.english: - Dragon glanced sideways at me, as if asking my opinion.
1000648071.korean: - 의견을 묻듯, 용이 곁눈질로 나를 살폈다.

1000648072.english: - Then, as if only just realizing I was there, Gamma made a show of herself.
1000648072.korean: - 그제야 내가 있단 걸 깨달은 것처럼 감마가 과장스럽게 행동했다.

1000648073.english: Oh! And who might this be?

1000648074.english: So you’re the last human, leading the Resistance.
1000648074.korean: 저항군을 이끌고 있다는 최후의 인간이 너였군.

1000648075.english: I told you not to move, Gamma!

1000648076.english: Take another step and you’ll regret it!

1000648077.english: - Despite both warnings, Gamma stepped toward me.
1000648077.korean: - 둘의 경고에도 감마는 나를 향해 한 걸음 내딛었다.

1000648080.english: - It all happened in an instant. I thought the bullet fired from Lilith’s Black Mamba would pierce Gamma’s forehead and take her life.
1000648080.korean: - 한순간에 일어난 일이었다. 리리스의 블랙 맘바에서 발사된 탄환이 감마의 미간을 꿰뚫고 목숨을 앗아가리라 생각했다.

1000648081.english: - As Gamma’s words about the timing of the check-in echoed in my head, I found myself already calculating—how much time until that report, how much time this operation would consume. We would have to hurry.
1000648081.korean: - 감마가 언급한 정기보고의 시간이 얼마나 남았는지, 이번 작전에 소요될 시간이 얼마나 될지 머릿속으로 계산하며 서둘러야겠다고 마음 먹은 순간.

1000648082.english: I’ve been thinking this for a while now…

1000648083.english: - Gamma dodged the bullet fired at close range with just a tilt of her head.
1000648083.korean: - 지근거리에서 발사된 총알을, 감마는 고개만 까딱여서 피해버렸다.

1000648084.english: I was debating whether to say it or not… but I can't hold back—I have to say it.
1000648084.korean: 말할지 말지 고민했는데... 안되겠어, 말해야 직성이 풀릴 것 같아.

1000648085.english: You… are really a boring one, huh?
